author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMCULI, uZakes Bantwini, ovule inhlangano engenzi nzuzo ngenjongo yokusiza intsha nabesifazane emkhakheni wamaciko nezemidlalo KULINDELEKE ukuthi igxile kakhulu emacikweni inhlangano engenzi nzuzo esanda kwethulwa yinkakha endimeni yomculo nesike yahlabana ngendondo iGrammy Award iphinde ibe umculi, uphrojusa, usomabizinisi nokunye. Inhlangano iZakes Bantwini Foundation, kulindeleke ukuthi ibhekane kakhulu nokuthuthukisa imiphakathi ehlukene ezintweni zamasiko, imfundo, umculo, nokuthuthisa amaciko. Ngale nhlangano, uZakes uthe ukholelwa ekutheni abantu abanethalente kumele bafundiswe futhi baqeqeshelwe imikhakha eminingi. Uthe ngayo akuhlose kakhulu ukuthuthukisa abesifazane, intsha futhi iqhakambise amakhono ezindaweni ezihlukene kuleli njengoba izozinikela ekutheni bafundiswe, bathuthukiswe baphinde babasize kukhona konke abakufunayo ukuze bavulekelwe amathuba ahlukene emikhakheni abayifunayo kuleli. "Izwe lethu ligcwele abantu abanamathalente ahlukene. Ngakho ukusungula le nhlangano ngikwenze ngoba ngifuna ukusiza la ngibona khona ukuthi kunesikhala kubantu abanamakhono nothando. Ngakho leli ithuba lokuthi kusizwe abantu abasha ngezinto abazidingayo, ulwazi namathuba esizobanika wona ukuze bathuthuke ezintweni abafisa ukuba yizona kusasa," kusho uZakes. Uthe bazoba nazo nezingqungquthela ezihlukene ngaphansi kwale nhlangano ezithinta ukuthuthukisa intsha nabesifazane emikhakheni asebeyivezile. "Siyathemba ukuthi senza into eyothuthukisa ngisho izizukulwane zethu, zisizakale kulokhu esikuqalayo manje sesingasekho. Ngale nhlangano sifuna ukubona isizukulwane esiyomela elakuleli emazweni omhlaba ezintweni ezithinta ubuciko nosomabhizinisi abakhulu. Njengenhlangano sivule izandla ukwamukela abaxhasi, abantu abafuna ukusebenza nathi kusuka kwabazimele nezinkampani, abafuna ukufaka esikhwameni sethu ukuze sikwazi ukuqhubeka sithuthuka siphinde sifake isandla emphakathini yakithi," kusho yena. Uthe maduzane bazohambela amadolobha ahlukene bethula le nhlangano kubantu abahlukene futhi bahlangane netsha ezimisele ukusebenza nabo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ABALINGISI bomdlalo Inimba okukhona kubo uLoyiso MacDonald, Lunathi Mampofu, Ayakha Ntunjwa, Sisanda Hewana noZenande Mfenyana. UMBHALI womdlalo Inimba okwathi uqala nje kwavela izindaba zokuthi wenza kahle ngababukeli, uSiphosethu Tshapu, uthi akuyona into encane kubo ukukhala bamuke nezindondo ezimbili emcimbini amaMVCA abeseNigeria ngempelasonto. USiphosethu ungomunye wababhali abasebancane abasanda kufika kulo mkhakha nabenza kahle kakhulu. Isiteshi sakwa-e.tv sisanda kuqala umdlalo othi Emzini nawo obhalwe uyena. UMBHALI womdlalo Inimba uSiphosethu Tshapu ejabulela izindondo abazithole kulo nyaka emicimbini emikhulu kuleli nasezwenikazi i-Afrika USiphosethu uthe uyaziqhenya ngomsebenzi abawenzile ngomdlalo Inimba, futhi bajabule ngezindondo abazitholile. "Izindondo esizitholile okukhona kuzo eyeBest Indegenous M-Net Original neyeBest Scripted Series, ziyinto esingeke siyithathe kancane futhi yinto engingeke ngiyikhohlwe emlandweni wami wokubhala imidlalo. Lesi yisikhumbuzo sokuthi imidlalo yalana ezwenikazi lethu i-Afrika siyixoxa ngobuqotho, sikhuluma ngento eyenzeka ngempela emiphakathini yangakithi futhi akukho esisaba ukukuvezela umphakathi," kusho uSiphosethu. Uthe akubonga kakhulu abalingisi abazinikele nababukeli. "Sibonga ababukeli okuyibo abantu ababaluleke kakhulu. Ababukeli bayakhuluma ngomdlalo kube nemibono ehlukene, nokuyinto ejabulisayo uma siyibona. Abanye uma siqokwa eminxeni efana nalena ngenxa yothando bayavota singabacelile kungakho umuntu ephethe lezi zindondo manje. Ngiyabonga kakhulu esiteshini iMutlichoice Canal + ngokungithemba ngesikhathi ngilethe umdlalo walolu hlobo kubo, bakholelwa kakhulu kuwo, namanje baphinde basipha enye isizini yesibili nokuyinto enkulu kithi yokuthi siqhubeke sixoxe izindaba zethu," kusho yena. Uthe lesi kuseyisiqalo kulo mkhakha akuwona njengoba iminingi imidlalo azimisele ukuyikhiqiza bese eyibona ikhonjiswa emazweni ahlukene.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: AYAPHELA amaphupho  kwabaqokwe kumaMetro FM Music Awards ase-ICC Arena eThekwini namuhla ngo-8 ebusuku. Le ndumezulu yomqhudelwano wezindondo izokhonjiswa bukhoma kuSABC 1 kusukela ngo-7.30 ebusuku njengoba kuzobe kuvela osaziwayo besahamba kukhaphethi omnyama. Angaphezu kuka-100 amaciko azobe edlana imilala eminxeni engu-21. Umunxa ozobe ubhekwe ngamehlo abomvu ngoweBest Song of The Year lapho kudlana khona imilala oSam Deep, Nia Pearl, Boohle & Mano – Shela, Dj Smallz, 031 Choppa & Uncool MC– Zep, Dj Maphorisa, Xduppy, Kabza De Small, Thatohatsi, Young Stunna & Nkosazana Daughter- Abantwana Bakho, Mawhoo, Gl ceejay, Jazzwrld & Thukuthela – Bengicela, Khadeair, Peekay Mzee & Kaytah – Magumba, Jazzwrld, Mawhoo, Thukuthela & Gl_ceejay – Uzizwa kanjani,Shandesh and Mvzzle – Sdudla or Slender,Goon Flavour, Master KG & Eemoh – Ngishutheni, uMafikizolo – Uzoncengwa unyoko noCiza, Jazzwrld & Thukuthela – Isaka. Kulo nyaka kuzobhekwa ukuthi iyiphi insizwa ezowina okokuqala emunxeni weBest Maskandi njengoba kuqhathwe Umafikizolo – Uzoncengwa Unyoko, Sminofu and Zee Nxumalo – Sajola Kamnandi, Mzukulu, Intombi yasoLundi – Ubu Ghost Bami, Khuzani – Umanikinikana noSiya Ntuli – Amaphiko. Umculi kamaskandi oshisa izikhotha kulezi zinsuku uNkeshemba, utholene phezulu noShandesh, Khadeair, Kharishma, Goon Flavour. Izintokazi zaseKZN uMawhoo noLwah Ndlunkulu zidudulana noLordkez, Zee Nxumalo noShandesh. UXolly Mncwango waseRichards Bay ubambene noNontokozo Mkhize, Musa Yende, Mmatema noNothando Hlophe. USam Deep ubhekene nenselelo emunxeni weBest Artist of The Year kuMaphorisa, Ciza,Shandesh noZee Nxumalo. UMawhoo angase aphume nesikhuni sivutha kwiBest Collaboration njengoba eqhathwe noSam Deep, Nia Pearl, Boohle and Mano – Shela, Jazzwrld, Mawhoo, Thukuthela and Gl_ceejay – Uzizwa Kanjani, Ladysmith Black Mambazo, Nduduzo Makhathini & Mbuso Khoza – You make me happy, Mawhoo, Gl ceejay, Jazzwrld & Thukuthela – Bengicela noGoon Favour, Master KG& Eemoh – Ngishutheni. *Kwenzeka lokho nje ziyabuya kwiMetro FM Music Awards Festival ePeople's Park eThekwini namhlanje kusukela ngo-2 ntambama. Kuzobe kusina kudedelana oYoung Stunna, Babalwa, DJ Tira, Lamiez Holworthy, Lerato Kganyango, Khuzani, Mthandeni, uMafikizolo, Big NUZ, Feza, Somizi Mhlongo, Zola Zee Loving, Skhinkily nabanye. *Kusasa ziyahephana kwiMetro FM Music Awards: Love Movement eBerea Rovers eThekwini kusukela ngo-12 emini. Kuzobe kunandisa uWilson B Nkosi, Paul Mtirara, Sentle Lehoko, Msizi Shembe, Naima Kay, Mondli Ngcobo, Naledi Aphiwe, Zamajobe, Nomfundo Moh, Nontokozo Mkhize, Lwah Ndlunkulu, Khutso Thiledi nabanye. *Kusasa ziyaphenduka kwiDubane Summer Break eShaka Marine World eThekwini kusukela ngo-9 ekuseni. Kuzobe kushiyelana  inkundla uGoldmax & Dankie Boi, Young Stunna, Blckie, Beast, Dladla Mshunqisi, Buko & DJ Sox, Loki, Louis Ribbs, and Tobzela,

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Usomahlaya uSimphiwe Lizwi Shembe ozobe enandisa kwiGala Dinner in Comedy ePort Shepstone ngoJuni 25 USOMAHLAYA uSimphiwe Lizwi Shembe uthi isihlukile indlela enza ngayo uma emenywe emicimbini ngoba akasagcini ngokuhlekisa kodwa ushiya nomyalezo osuke ubalulekile ezethamelini. USimphiwe, oseneminyaka eyibambile, uthe uyahlekisa kodwa aphinde akhulise asuke ekhuluma nabo. “Abantu sebethola abantu ababili koyedwa manje. Abasahleki kuphela, sebehleka bese abantu abadala beyakhula ngoba sinabafana abaningi abana-60 noma 70. Okusho ukuthi wumuntu omdala ongakhulile kodwa omncane,” kusho uSimphiwe. Uthe uSimphiwe uyahlekisa kodwa uLizwi ngeke umqonde futhi akakwazi ukumchaza ukuthi ungumuntu owethula izinkulumo ezakhayo noma onjani. USimphiwe ubekhuluma ngesikhathi ebuzwa yileli phephandaba ngomcimbi iGala Dinner in Comedy azonandisa kuyo oGu Sports & Leisure Centre, ePort Shepstone ngoJuni 25. “Ngagcina ukunandisa ogwini oluseningizimu ngingakabi namfazi (njengoba sekukhona)  uMaKhumalo. Kukhona umehluko, angiseyena loya mfana owayesho noma yini ngoba kuqala ngangisho noma yini, manje sekumele ngiwakhethe amagama ngale kokubhora. Abantu bazothola usomahlaya nombhali. Asikwazi sonke ukuhlekisa. NoSkhinkily uyahlekisa, okusho ukuthi ayikho into ehlukile ngawe uma uwusomahlaya kodwa ukuhluka kusuka endleleni okhetha ngayo amagama. Okhetha ukukusho kuzoba nomthelela ekutheni abantu bayakukhumbula yini uma kuphela ubusuku,” kusho uSimphiwe. Uthe uLizwi ubuka izinto ngenye indlela futhi ukhuluma engasabi ukuthi abantu bazothini. “ULizwi akabuswa yisinkwa kodwa uholwa yilowo myalezo okumele uzwiwe ngalelo langa. Kungenzeka lowo myalezo umqedele isinkwa kodwa umyalezo. Asikwazi ukubamba umyalezo. Umlayezo osuke kufanele uzwiwe umuntu ofikile ngalelo langa.” Emcimbini azobe enandisa kuwo ePort Shepstone uzobe eshiyelana inkundla noSimunye Churchboy noZawadi Yamungu. Izicukuthwane zizozitika ngokudla, umculo, amahlaya zithole nethuba lokwakha ubudlelwano. Lo mcimbi oyingxenye ye-Offramp Experience, wandulela iWorship Experience ngakusasa ebusuku endaweni efanayo. Kuzobe sekuvalwa ngendumezulu Ugu Jazz Festival ngoJuni 27 kuyona le nkundla lapho kuzobe kufakwe khona ubhazabhaza wetende elikhombisa isibhakabhaka futhi elivulwe emaceleni. Kuzobe kushiyelana inkundla uMawhoo, Olefied Khetha, Don Laka, Ernie Smith, Siphokazi, Mondli Ngcobo, Naledi Aphiwe, Mawelele, Danya Devs nabanye. Amathikithi ayo yonke le micimbi aqala kuR200 eTicketpro, Spar, Pick n Pay naseBoxer.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UTHANDOH  Gumede ongumsunguli werobhothi elinguthisha wazozonke izifundo, u-Iris UNOBUHLE wakwaMnqobokazi, eHluhluwe, uThandoh "BS" Gumede, uzobonakala nezinkakha zabalingisi emdlalweni omusha ozongena esikhaleni seScandal! ku-etv. Isolezwe Ngempelasonto lithole ukuthi uThandoh uzobe elingisa noRami Chuene noSindi Dlathu kulo mdlalo osihloko sithi Four Of Us. Ethintwa uThandoh, obuye aziwe ngelikaMaka-Iris, ukuqinisekisile ukuthi uzovela kulo mdlalo esebenza endaweni yokucwalwa izinwele. Unxuse ukungandi ngamagama ngenxa yesivumelwano asisayine nabadidiyeli. Inkonyane izobe ingathuki isisinga kuThando njengoba eseke walingisa emidlalweni Empini, Muvhango nasesikhangisweni sakwa-Assupol. "Ukulingisa ngisuka kude nakho njengoba ngakuqala ngisafunda e-University of Zululand futhi umkhakha engiwuthandayo. Okungichaza ngokulingisa ukuthi kuyangivumela ukuba ngizichaze futhi kuyindlela yokushaywa wumoya nokubuyisa amandla emuva kokusebenza kanzima kwezobuchwepheshe." UThandoh uphethe isicoco sikaMiss Tech Universe asiwina eqhathwe nezintokazi zamazwe ngamazwe ezingongoti kwezobuchwepheshe emcimbini waseThailand. Ngaphambi kokuhlabana ngalesi sicoco, wayeqale waqwaqwada izintokazi zase-Afrika kuMiss Dot Africa. Ngo-2024 uThando ube esesungula irobhothi elibizwa ngo-Iris elisebenza njengothisha nelinolwazi lwazo zonke izifundo ezenziwa kusukela kuGrade 1 kuya emanyuvesi akuleli futhi uqeketha izilimi ezingu-11 ezikhulunywa kuleli ngokusemthethweni. Ngaphandle kwalokho ungumsunguli wesikole sokuqala endaweni yasemakhaya eHluhluwe, esigxile ezifundweni zobuchwepheshe, iMaths neSayensi esigcina ku-matric, iBSG Technologies Combined School. UNksz Thando ‘’BS“ Gumede ozobonakala emdlalweni weTV omusha

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKSZ Lwandile Nkwanyana, othweswe iziqu ze-Diploma in Public Management e-DUT UKUNGAFELI ngaphakathi kukaNksz Lwandile Nkwanyana, owasebenzisa izinkundla zokuxhumana ukuzwakalisa ukukhathazeka kwakhe ngokuchithwa kwesicelo sokufunda enyuvesi ngendlela engaqondakali, kumnike umvuzo nezithelo ezibonakalayo. UNksz Nkwanyana (26) waseBhanganomo, KwaNongoma, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal - wacishe wangaqhubeka nemfundo yakhe enyuvesi ngenkathi ehambela ubala eDurban University of Technology (DUT), ophikweni iNdumiso, eMgungundlovu, echithwa esefikile. “Kwaba yisimo esibuhlungu kakhulu kimina leso ngoba ngase ngilinde isikhathi eside ukuthi ngithole ithuba lokufunda emva kokuphothula u-matric ngo-2017, kepha ngingabi nenhlanhla yokwamukelwa kwesicelo sami emanyuvesi ehlukene. “Kuthe ngo-2022 kwamukelwa isicelo sami sokwenza izifundo ze-Diploma in Public Management e-DUT, kodwa ngajabha sengifikile khona ngiyobhalisa ngoJanuwari ngo-2023, sebengitshela ukuthi isikhala sami sesinikwe omunye umuntu,” kusho yena. UNKSZ Lwandile Nkwanyana, othweswe iziqu ze-Diploma in Public Management e-DUT Nokho sekuwumlando manje ukuthi uNksz Nkwanyana usethweswe iziqu zalo mkhakha ngenxa yokuthi  ngenkathi echithwa kanjena, akafelanga ngaphakathi - kunalokho wanikela ekhasini leFacebook iLadies House, waneka usizi lwakhe, echaza okumehlele. “Ngachaza ukuthi kwenzekeni, ngizwakalisa nokuphoxeka kwami ukuthi ngase ngihambe ibanga elide kangaka ngisuka eGoli lapho ebese ngihlala khona nomama ongasebenzi, ngithi ngiyofunda eMgungundlovu ngenhloso yokushintsha isimo sasekhaya. “Nangempela ngaba nenhlanhla, ngathintwa uNksz Zama Mncube owayesesigungwini esiphethe izitshudeni ngaleso sikhathi. Wathembisa ukungisiza ukulungisa inkinga yami. Kwaba njalo, wangithinta sekulungile konke ngakusasa. Ngaphindela khona ngayofunda futhi baba baningi nabangizwela, bangipha nemali,” kusho uNksz Nkwanyana. Eqhuba, uthe nokho akubanga lula konke njengoba kwathi esaqhubeka nokufunda ngonyaka wokuqala, washonelwa wubaba wengane yakhe eneminyaka emihlanu manje, owashona ngokudutshulwa. “Konke lokho kwangiphazamisa kakhulu emoyeni nasenhliziyweni yami, kepha ngaphokophela ngoba ngangifisa ukuthi ngiphumelele ngemfundo yami. Kuphela ngizwela laba engangichithwe nabo ngalowa nyaka. Iningi labo lagcina lingalitholalanga ithuba elatholwa yimina ngoba nami ngasukuma, ngangafela ngaphakathi,” kusho uNksz Nkwanyana okumanje uqhubeka nemfundo yakhe njengoba esenza i-Advanced Diploma in Public Management and Administration khona e-DUT.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ZIKHALE ngaphansi izikhulu zikaMasipala wasebaQulusini, i-DA ivimba isiphakamiso sokuthi zigixabezwe ngamabhonasi. Image: Itumeleng English/ Independent Newspaper ZIKHALE ngaphansi izikhulu zikaMasipala wasebaQulusini, i-DA ivimba isiphakamiso sokuthi zigixabezwe ngamabhonasi. Isiphakamiso sokuthi izikhulu zomkhandlu zinikwe amabhonasi sichithiwe emhlanganweni womkhandlu emva kokuba i-DA izwakalise ukungahambisani nesiphakamiso. Umasipala uphethwe ngokubambisana yi-IFP ne-DA. Ukwenqaba kwe-DA ukweseka isiphakamiso kwenze ukuthi singaphumeleli. IKhansela le-DA, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe, lithe banqume ukuphikisana nesiphakamiso ngenxa yokuthi abukho ubufakazi abanikwe bona obukhombisa ukuthi lezi zikhulu ebezizonikwa amabhonasi ziwenze ngendlela encomekayo umsebenzi wazo. "Ukunika umuntu ibhonasi engakhombisanga ukuthi ukwenze konke abebekelwe ukuba akwenze kufana nokuthi uyamupha nje imali yomphakathi. Kufanele kube nombiko onobufakazi bokuthi umuntu ukwazile ukukwenza konke abebekelwe khona ngaphambi kokuthi umbonge ngebhonasi." UShelembe uthe bacele izikhulu obekuhlongozwa ukuthi zinikwe amabhonasi ukuba zilethe ubufakazi obukhombisa ukuthi zikwazile ukukwenza konke ebezibekelwe khona. "Ngenxa yokuthi abuzange bulethwe ubufakazi ebesibufuna, isiphakamiso sokuthi banikwe amabhonasi asizange siphumelele. Siyalele imenenja kamasipala ukuba yenze isiqiniseko sokuthi asikho isiphakamiso esifana nalesi esizolethwa emhlanganweni womkhandlu ngaphandle uma kuwukuthi sizokube sihambisana nobufakazi." UShelembe uthe kunzima ukukhuluma indaba yokunika izikhulu zomkhandlu amabhonasi ekubeni ingqalasizinda yomkhandlu ifadabala. Uthe ukubusa ngokubambisana angeke kubenze ukuthi bavume noma yini ephakanyiswa yiqembu abambisene nalo. "Sikukhombisile lokho namhlanje ngokuthi siphikisane nalesi siphakamiso. Ngesikhathi singena kuhulumeni sazibophezela ekusebenzeni ngobuqotho saphinda futhi sazibophezela ukuthi sizoqinisekisa ukuthi abantu bazithola ngendlela izidingo. Angeke sigudluke kulezi zibophezelo esazenzayo. Ngeke sivumelane nezinqumo ezingeke zibasize ngalutho abantu basebaQulusini. Abantu basebaQulusini kufanele bazi ukuthi imali yabo isebenze kanjani."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: AMAQEMBU aphikisayo alolela izembe uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, kulandela isinqumo seNkantolo yezoMthethosisekelo esivuse upelepele ogqokweni ngodaba lokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe iPhala Phala. Amaqembu amabili asefake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa, kuneqembu lesithathu lona elifuna kusungulwe ngokushesha ikomiti elizoqhuba uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Amaqembu i-MKP, EFF ne-ATM abhalele uSomlomo, uNkk Thoko Didiza. Nakuba izicelo zala maqembu zingafani kodwa onke afuna ukuthi uRamaphosa adliwe yizembe. I-MKP ne-ATM bafuna kulalelwe ngokushesha isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. I-EFF yona ifuna kusungulwe ngokushesha ikomiti elizoqhuba uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Lolu hlelo oluhlongozwa yi-EFF luhlukile kunesiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi. Umholi okhishwa ngaphansi kwalolu hlelo akayitholi imihlomulo yakhe okubalwa nempesheni njengoba kwenzeka kowayeyinhlomo yamajaji eWestern Cape, uDkt John Hlophe, nowayengumvikeli womphakathi, u-Advocate Busisiwe Mkhwebane. Uhlelo oluhlongozwa yi-EFF luyaye luthathe isikhathi njengoba kuba nezigcawu zokulalelwa kwezethulo lapho osuke esuswa esikhundleni enikwa ithuba lokuziphendulela. Uma kunesiphakamiso sokungamethembi umengameli kuyaye kube nempikiswano ePhalamende, bese kuyavotwa. Okungaphinde kubambezele uhlelo oluhlongozwa i-EFF ukuthi uRamaphosa aphonsele inselelo umbiko wethimba lasePhalamende elaliholwa yijaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uSandile Ngcobo, owathola ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona uRamaphosa okufanele akuphendule ezinsolweni zokuthi awabikelwanga amaphoyisa ngokuntshontshwa kwemali epulazini lakhe. URamaphosa wake wazama ukuwuphonsela inselelo umbiko kodwa wabuye wayeka ngenxa yokuthi iPhalamende lawuchitha. Njengoba isinqumo sangoLwesihlanu sesibuyisele umbiko ezithebeni zePhalamende, kungeza uRamaphosa abuyele enkantolo. USihlalo we-EFF onguSotswebhu weqembu ePhalamende, uNkk Nontando Noluntshungu, ubhalele uNkk Didiza ecela ukuba kusungulwe ikomiti ngokushesha. UNkk Noluntshungu uthe isinqumo senkantolo siqede nya umbango obukhona ngalolu daba. Unqumele uNkk Didiza umnqamulajuqu wezinsuku ezimbili ukuba aqinisekise ukusungulwa kwekomiti. "Uma singayitholi impendulo kulesi esisibekile, uze wazi ukuthi sinelungelo lokukuthathela izinyathelo zomthetho. Lolu daba selubambezeleke kakhulu. Asifuni kuphinde kube nokubambezeleka." Umholi weMKP ePhalamende, uHlophe, uthe abasabuthembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. UHlophe uthe bafuna ukuthi isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa silalelwe lingakashoni elangoLwesithathu. UHlophe nomholi we-ATM, uMnuz Vuyo Zungula, bathe bafuna ukuthi kuvotwe ngokuyimfihlo esiphakamisweni sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. Ubuholi be-ANC KwaZulu-Natal buzwakalise ukumeseka uRamaphosa. Umdidiyeli wethimba elihola i-ANC KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Mike Mabuyakhulu, uthe isinqumo senkantolo asisho ukuthi uRamaphosa unecala. Amaqembu abambisene ne-ANC kuhulumeni wokubambisana, okubalwa kuwo iDA ne-IFP. awazange afune ukusho ukuthi azophikisana yini nokuthi kukhishwe uRamaphosa esikhundleni. La maqembu ame ngelokuthi kufanele kulandelwe umthetho.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMLINGISI uRosemary Zimu ozobonakala elingisa emdlalweni oqale izolo othi Strings Attached UMLINGISI, uRosemary Zimu, uthi kumvule amehlo yize eseshadile ukuba semdlalweni othinta ukuhlukumezeka othandweni, njengoba izolo kuqale umdlalo othi Strings Attached, okhonjiswa ngo-8 ebusuku kuMzansi Magic. Kulo mdlalo uRosemary ulingisa indawo ephambili kaLethabo okungowesifazane othandana  nowesilisa omhlukumeza ngokumenzisa izinto angazithandi. URosemany uthe indawo kaXolani elingiswa uMelusi Mbhele iveza ukuthi owesifazane angazithola kanjani ethandana nowesilisa onamanga owenza konke ukuze kubukeke sengathi uyamthanda owesifazane anaye kanti ufuna ukufeza izinhloso zakhe. "Umdlalo oveza owesilisa edlala umdlalo womqondo ngowesifazane ozithola esengene shi ezinkingeni ekubeni yena ubezitshela ukuthi uze ngothando. Into esihlala siyibona lena kwabanye abantu, nesithemba ukuthi kukhona abazovuleka amehlo. ULethabo ngowesifazane obheke umndeni wakhe njengoba kunguye osebenzayo kodwa ukuhlangana nalona wesilisa kushintsha izinto eziningi empilweni yakhe," kusho uRosemary. Uphrojusa walo mdlalo, uNthabi Tau wenkampani iRay Content Hub, uthe umdlalo awusungule ngemuva kokubona ukuthi ukuba sothandweni nomuntu okudlala umqondo kuyinto esithe chithi saka, nokuvezwa abantu abaningi emphakathini sengathi uthando lweqiniso. "Umdlalo ozoveza izinto eziningi ezithinta uthando, ezenzekayo kodwa okungakhulunywa ngazo esidlangalaleni. Sifuna ukukuveza kodwa isiphetho salo mdlalo sizoba yinto ebingalindelekile kwabaningi. Abalingisa kulo mdlalo babe yile nto esiyifunayo njengoba bekumele baxhumane kube sengathi bathandanai okwangempela yize belingisa, bakwazile ukukuqonda  ebesikufisa ngempela umdlalo waphuma ngendlela ebesifisa ngayo," kusho uNthabi. Uthe akufisayo ngalo mdlalo wukuthi kube khona izingxoxo ezithinta ukuzithanda nokuzivikela kubantu abahlukene abathi bayakuthanda. Ukugqamisa ilokhu uthando okumele lube yikhona ukuze lube luhle kubona bobabili abantu abakulo kungabi khona oyibhoklolo.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMPETHA omusha we-WBC Strawweight, uSiyakholwa Kuse, ujoyine izinkakha kwezamankomane ngokuwina leli bhande, e-Emperors Palace, eGauteng, ngoMgqibelo Image: Isithombe:SITHUNYELWE UZIFAKE emabhukwini omlando umshayisibhakela wase-Eastern Cape, uSiyakholwa "One Way" Kuse, ewina ibhande lomhlaba le-World Boxing Council (WBC) Strawwweight ngoMgqibelo ebusuku. UKuse waseDuncan Village, wehlule ngamaphuzu umpetha uMelvin Jerusalem wasePhillippines empini ebise-Emperors Palace, eGauteng. Bekungeyosuku kwebezihlelwe yiGolden Gloves Promotions kaRodney Berman. Womathathu amajaji impi ayinike uKuse ngo 111-116, 112-115, 112-116. Ngokuwina ibhande le-WBC eliyinyama emhlabeni wonke, uKuse ungene emabhukwini omlando wesibhakela saseNingizimu Afrika. Ungowesine kubashayisibhakela bakuleli abaphathe ibhande le-WBC. Abanye nguThulani "Sugarboy" Malinga (KwaZulu-Natal), Dingaan "The Rose of Soweto" Thobela (Gauteng) noKevin "The KO Kid" Lerena (Gauteng). Ngaphezu kwalokho, uKuse ngumshayisibhakela wokuqala wase-Eastern Cape owine leli bhande phezu kokuba lesi sifundazwe sikhiqize ompetha bomhlaba bezinhlangano ezihlukene ezisindweni ezihlukene. UKuse uthe kumkhuthazile ukwazi ukuthi isifundazwe sakhe asikaze simkhiqize umpetha we-WBC. "Bekungelula ngesikhathi ngilungiselela impi. Kulokhu ngizikhandle kakhulu ukuze ngizoqopha umlando. Uma ngibuka amarekhodi e-WBC akekho umshayisibhakela wase-Eastern Cape. Ngakho ngizitshelile ukuthi ngizoyiwina mina," kusho uKuse. Impi kaKuse noJerusalem ibiyimpinda kwazise baxhimfana ngo-Okthoba nyakenye, ePhillippines, wakhala ngaphansi umshayisibhakela wakuleli. Emuva kwezikhalo, ngalo mphumela amakhona avumelana ngokuthi impi iphindwe eMzansi. UBerman ukuqinisekisile ukuthi uKuse uzolivikela ekhaya ibhande le-WBC ngaphambi kokufaka inselelo kwabanye ompetha bomhlaba esisindweni sakhe. Imenenja kaKuse, uBrian Mitchell, ithe: "Sasizitshela ukuthi siwinile ePhillippines kodwa sakwamukela ukuthi kwakunzima ukuhlukanisa ukuthi ubani owinile. Besikwazi obekufanele sikwenze okuwukushaya umpetha ngendlela ecacile. UKuse ungumshayisibhakela osezingeni eliphezulu, usewine konke esibhakeleni, isicoco somhlaba se-WBC, ese-WBC Silver, ungumpetha waseNingizimu Afrika futhi uneminyaka engu-26 kuphela."

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMNYANGO wezaseKhaya uqinisa izinhlelo zokukhipha omazisi ama-smart ID ukulwa nenkohlakalo yokukhwatshaniswa kwemininingwane yabasaphatha omazisi abadala. Babalelwa ku-16 million abantu bakuleli abasasebenzisa omazisi abadala abaluhlaza. Lokhu kuvezwe nguNgqongqoshe woMnyango, uDkt Leon Schreiber, ngesikhathi ethula isabelomali sika-R13.8 billion salo Mnyango ePhalamende. Uthe bandisa izindawo abantu abazokwazi ukushaya kuzona omazisi ama-smart ID njengoba behlela ukuthi kuphele unyaka, bebe sebeshaywa emagatsheni angu-750 amabhange akuleli. "Sekuthatha imizuzu emihlanu ukushaya omazisi emabhange. Okwamanje angu-167 amabhange enza lo msebenzi esihlele ukunyusa isibalo sawo ungakapheli lo nyaka. Sifuna ukuqeda inkohlakalo yokwebiwa kolwazi lwalabo abasasebenzisa omazisi abadala. Labo mazisi abadala ibona abakhwatshaniswa kakhulu e-Afrika," usho kanje. UMnuz Njabulo Nzuza oyiPhini likaNgqongqoshe uthe onyakenimali u-2025/2026, baqophe umlando ngokukhipha ama-smart ID evile ku-4 milllion. Uthe bandise amahhovisi okushaywa kuwo omazisi, wathi kube nezinhlelo zokuhambela imiphakathi esemakhaya ukuyazisa ngalolu hlelo. "Ukubambisana kwezinhlaka ezehlukene ikhona okwenze sakwazi ukukhipha omazisi abangaka. Sihambele imiphakathi esemakhaya nehlala ezindaweni ezikude." USchreiber uthe maduzane bahlela ukufaka uhlelo lokushaywa kwama-passports emabhange. "Sifuna ukuthi omazisi nama-passports alethwe emakhaya. Kuzobe kungokokuqala emlandweni ukuthi kwenzeke into efuze le kuleli. Abantu sifuna bakwazi ukuthi bathunyelelwe labo mazisi nama-passports kusetshenziswa uhlelo lwe-courier, bangaze baye emahhovisi ethu." Udalule nokuthi masonto onke bakhomba indlela noma babopha abasebenzi abakhohlakele abasebenza ngaphansi kweBorder Management Authority (BMA). "Selokhu ngiqale eMnyangweni, bevile ku-14 abasebenzi ababoshiwe, kwaxoshwa abangu-65, kwagwetshwa abangu-10 ngamacala ahlukene kwabasebenza kwiBMA. Asibafuni abasebenzi abakhohlakele njengoba sisemkhankasweni wokubuyisela emuva abantu bakwamanye amazwe abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Bevile ku-110 000 esesibabuyisele emazweni kanti bevile ku-945 000 esibavimbe ngempumelelo bangakwazi ukungena kuleli." UNzuza uthe baqinisa nasekubhaliseni izingane ingakapheli inyanga zizelwe. "Njengoba kuzovotwa, nginxusa abantu ukuthi balande omazisi babo emahhovisi ethu. Kubalulekile ukwenza lokhu ukuze bakwazi ukubamba iqhaza okhethweni," kusho uNzuza. Amanye amalungu ePhalamende akhale ngokuthi uma kubuyiselwa abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho kugxilwa kwabantu abamnyama ekubeni bekhona nabezinye izinhlanga.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UDIVINE Lunga odlala emuva kwiMamelodi Sundowns ekhuluma nabezindaba ngaphambi komdlalo womlenze wokuqala wamanqamu weCaf Champions League ISIFO sakamuva esihlasele iMamelodi Sundowns sokuba nomusa namagoli kufanele siphele kowomlenze wokuqala wamanqamu weCaf Champions League ne-AS FAR yaseMorocco ozodlalwa kusasa ngo-4 ntambama, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. Lesi yisexwayiso sesitobha seSundowns esidabuka eZimbabwe, uDivine Lunga, esisitshele abezindaba ngesikhathi sixoxa nabo ngamalungiselelo ale ndumezulu yomdlalo. Muva nje iSundowns ikhombise umkhuba ongajwayelekile kuyona wokudedela kalula amagoli. Ingenelwe ayisikhombisa emidlalweni emibili edlule yeBetway Premiership ibhekene neSiwelele FC ne-TS Galaxy ngokwahlukana. ULunga ubona lokhu kugula kwakamuva kuyikhona kuphela okungakhubaza leli qembu laseChloorkop emizamweni yalo yokudla isicoco sase-Afrika okokuqala kusukela ngo-2016. ISundowns iya kulo mdlalo kunongabazange ngodonga lwayo lwasemuva kwazise uGrant Kekana ngeke adlale ngenxa yesigwebo samakhadi kanti uMothobi Mvala usanda kubuya ekulimaleni. Konke lokhu kwenzeka nje, uKeanu Cupido, walimala bebhekene neKaizer Chiefs koweligi. Isitobha esifithi nguKhulumani Ndamane onenkinga yokwenza amaphutha asobala kulezi zinsuku. Esinye isitobha angasisebenzisa kulo mdlalo umqeqeshi weSundowns uMiguel Cardoso nguKegan Johannes yize engenaso kangako isipiliyoni kwiChampions League. “Sizinike isikhathi esanele sasebenza ngendaba yokwehlisa isibalo samagoli kwazise lokhu kuyasiphoxa njengoba siyiqembu elidume ngokungadedeli lutho,” kusho uLunga. “Yonke imiqhudelwano imqoka kodwa kwiChampions League kasinawo uphawini wokuvumela inqwaba yamagoli njengoba senzile kweyakamuva. Kangisayiphathi-ke eyokuthi ngumdlalo womlenze wokuqala wamanqamu. “Okwenzeke emidlalweni yeligi yakamuva kufanele kusiphushe nakakhulu ukuthi senze konke okusemandleni ukuyiwina iChampions League." Lesi sitobha kasikabukhohlwa ubuhlungu bokuphunyukwa yilesi sicoco ngesizini edlule lapho bashaywa khona yiPyramids FC yase-Egypt eyayingenamlando ebholeni lase-Afrika. “Ibhola limnandi ngokuthi liyanikana ithuba lokwesula izinyembezi, ngakho-ke asikwazi ukuliyeka. I-AS FAR inzima ngoba isifike kowamanqamu kodwa kulokhu ngeke silenze iphutha esalenza kwiPyramids ngesizini edlule,” kusho uLunga.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UBRIAN Baloyi, owayengunozinti weKaizer Chiefs, ukholwa wukuthi ukudonsa kanzima kwaleli qembu kudalwa yizinkinga eziningi okubalwa kuzona ukungabikhona kwesikhulu esiphezulu esizokwenza umsebenzi oshiywe ngusihlalo, uKaizer "Chincha Guluva" Motaung, osededele izingane zakhe ekuphathweni kwaMakhosi. UBaloyi owadlalela iChiefs phakathi kuka-1993 no-2004, ubekhuluma kwi-podcast, i-soccerbeat, kuleli sonto. Sekungumlando ukuthi iChiefs yayibalwa namaqembu okwakungapheli isizini engawinanga neyokubika indebe. Empeleni Amakhosi, asungulwa ngo-1970, ahamba phambili ngezindebe ebholeni laseMzansi ngeziwu-93. Nokho isomiso esiwahlasele kule minyaka, sesiwaqhathe nabalandeli. Eminyakeni eyishumi edlule, iChiefs iqukule iNedbank Cup kuphela, eyiwine nyakenye yehlula izimbangi i-Orlando Pirates eThekwini. Kule sizini isiphunyukwe yizona zonke izindebe futhi akubukeki isenalo ithuba lokuwina iligi yeBetway Premiership. Abalandeli bagxeka abaphathi beqembu, ikakhulukazi uKaizer Motaung Jr. UBaloyi uthe inkinga isekuphathweni kweqembu kusukela kwaqhela uMotaung, waliyekela ezinganeni zakhe, uMotaung Jr, Jessica Motaung, Kemiso Motaung noBobby Motaung. "Ngokwami umuntu owayephethe iqembu, asivaleki isikhala sakhe. UChincha Guluva kusukela ekulisunguleni nasekuliphatheni, kuze kuba uyalishiya manje. Akulula (ukuvala isikhala sakhe). Eminyakeni edlule, iChiefs ibisebenza ngaphandle kwesikhulu esiphezulu, bekuhlala kungusihlalo nabaqondisi ezindaweni ezihlukene. Ngicabanga ukuthi okungaxazulula izinkinga wukuba nesikhulu esiphezulu esizokwengamela konke, nabo bonke abasebenzayo," kusho uBaloyi ekhuluma ekhasini leSoccerbeat kwiYouTube. "Kuphakathi kokuthi omunye wabo, uMotaung Jr, Jessica, Kemiso noBobby, ukusithatha lesi sikhundla ngoba ngicabanga ukuthi kunesikhala esikhona esidinga ukuvalwa... Kungaba ngowesilisa noma owesifazane othatha isikhundla sokuba yisikhulu esiphezulu, bonke basebenze ngaphansi kwakhe ngoba okwamanje kunesikhala esingabonakali ngamehlo enyama uma ungaphandle. Kodwa uma uqala ukubheka ukuthi yini inkinga kwiChiefs, uyabona ukuthi lena ngenye yazo, yisikhala esashiywa ngusihlalo ongasekho ngokugcwele njengoba bekwenzeka. Omunye wabo kufanele athathe isikhala sesikhulu esiphezulu, bonke babike kuyena. Lowo muntu uyena ozodlulisela izinto ebhodini, kubalandeli nakubona bonke abantu." IChiefs izobuyela enkundleni ngoMgqibelo isiyobhekana ne-Orbit College emdlalweni wePremiership eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Kuqiniswa izinhlelo zokuzenzela ukuze kuncishiswe imali UQINISA ezinhlelweni zolimo, ezokukhiqiza izinto ezehlukene kanjalo nakwezamakhono uMnyango wezokuHlunyeleliswa kweziMilo, kulandela ukuncishiswa kwesabelomali. Isabelomali salo nyakamali u-2026/2027, sincishiwe ngo-R683.4 million, njengoba singu-R30 billion. Lokhu kuvezwe nguNgqongqoshe woMnyango, uDkt Pieter Groenewald, ngesikhathi ethula isabelomali salo Mnyango ePhalamende. Uthe ngeke basonge izandla bangenzi lutho bakhalaze ngokuncishiswa kwesabelomali. "Sifuna ukuzimela ngokuthi siqinise kwezolimo, ezokukhiqiza kanjalo nezinye izinto ngoba zinyuka njalo izindleko. Sihlinzeka nangamakhono iziboshwa ukuze zikwazi ukuzimela uma zidedelwa ezikhungweni zethu," usho kanje. Uthe sebevule amabhikawozi angu-12 ezikhungweni ezehlukene. "Eka-13 kulindeleke ukuthi iqale ukusebenza kulo nyaka wezimali ejele iQalakabusha. Songe u-R77.1 million wokuthenga izinkwa onyakenimali u-2025/2026 ngenxa yamabhikawozi asezikhungweni zethu." Uthe ezikhungweni ezehlukene kukhiqizwa izitshalo, inyama, ubisi kanti benza nefenisha. "Kuthungwa nemifaniswano neminye imikhiqizo. Lokhu kusenza ukuthi singathembeli ekuthengeni njalo izinto kodwa sizenzele." Uthe kusuka ngo-Ephreli nyakenye kuya kuFebhuwari nonyaka, isikhungo iWitbank Textile senze imifanisawno engu-40 869. "Lesi sibalo sinyukile uma usiqhathanisa neminyaka edlule. Songe u-R125 million ngemikhiqizo yezolimo." Udalule nokuthi bahlinzeka eminye iminyango kahulumeni ngefenisha. "Sithole ama-order abalelwa enanini elingaphezu kuka-R100 000, onyakenimali u-2025/2026. Iminyango esisebenzisana nayo kubalwa owezaManzi, owezokuVikela, owezemiSebenzi yoMphakathi, owezobuLungiswa neminye. Akwanele lokhu yingakho nginxenxa neminye iminyango ukuthi ibambisane nathi ukuze sisebenzisane." Uthe baxoxa noMnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo ukuze bawakhele ama-deski abafundi. Utshele amalungu ePhalamende ukuthi ubuyisa uhlelo lokuklomelisa ngezindondo izisebenzi ezineminyaka ziyibambile emnyangweni. "Sizoklomelisa abaneminyaka engu-10, 20, 30 na-40. Sifuna ukubahlonipha ngemisebenzi yabo emihle abayenzayo eMnyangweni." Uthe uxoxile nezikhulu zamajele ahlukene kuleli ukuze kuqiniswe ezokulawulwa kwalezi zikhungo. "Ngiyalele uKhomishana wamajele ukuthi kubuyekezwe eyokuqeqeshwa kwezikhulu ezenza umsebenzi obalulekile, kubhalwe izivivinyo njalo ngonyaka ukuze sibone ukuthi zisakulungele ukulawula lezi zikhungo. Sifuna ukuthi zilandele yonke imigomo yoMnyango."

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuboshwe amaphoyisa amabili Image: Itumeleng English / Independent Newspapers Amaphoyisa angosigaxamabhande amabili kanye nesakhamuzi okusolwa ukuthi bayamataniswa nokudayisa ngokungemthetho kanye nokutholakala nezinsimbi eziyigugu baboshwe kulandela uphenyo olunzulu olwenziwa yi-Gauteng Counter Intelligence Operations (GCI-OPS). Abasolwa, baboshwe kulandela uphenyo ngezinsolo zokuthengiselana ngensimbi eyigugu, inkohlakalo kanye namacala ahlobene nawo. Ukuboshwa kwalaba baboshwe ngempelasonto yithimba ebelikhiphe incwadi egunyaza ukuboshwa kwabo i-J50. Kukholakala ukuthi inqwaba yamaphoyisa asebenzisa ubuhlakani abehambisana nabaseshi ngesikhathi igasela emafulethini aseHoughton eGoli, lapho kuboshwe khona uMajor-General Firoz Khan. Kuthiwa amaphoyisa ashaye izicabha ukuze angene endlini. Ngokubika kwe-eNCA, kushaqwe inqwaba yamaselula ngesikhathi kuseshwa. UKhan kanye neNhloko yoKlebe, uMajor-General Ebrahim Kadwa, kulindeleke bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKempton Park kusasa. UKadwa yena ulandwe emzini wakhe oseGoli. Ngokombiko wamaphoyisa, laba bobabili, kanye nowesilisa, ongumnikazi wenkampani yonogada eThekwini, baboshwe kulandela uphenyo ngezinsolo zokudayisa ngokungemthetho kanye nokutholakala nezinsimbi eziyigugu. Lokhu kuboshwa kuyingxenye yemizamo eqhubekayo yabezomthetho yokuhlakaza amanethiwekhi obugebengu abathintekayo ekuhwebeni ngokungemthetho kwezimbiwa ezibalulekile nenkohlakalo. Abasolwa kulindeleke ukuba bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKempton Park, ngoMsombuluko bebhekene namacala angase ahlanganise ukudayisa ngokungemthetho izinsimbi eziyigugu, aphule umthetho, inkohlakalo kanye nokwephula umthetho olawula izinsimbi eziyigugu eNingizimu Afrika. Iqembu lepolitiki elisolwa uFloyd Shivhambu I-Afrika Mayibuye Movement ikwamukele ukuboshwa kwamaphoyisa UMajor General uFiroz Khan no-Ebrahim Kadwa osekunesikhathi eside besolwa ngobugebengu. Lawa maphoyisa asolwa ngamacala anzima ahlanganisa nokusebenzisa budedengu izikhundla zawo esiphoyiseni ukuze kuzuze wona kanye nenkohlakalo ehleliwe. Isitatimende se-Africa Mayibuye ngokuboshwa kwamaphoyisa amabili

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UZOLA Luthuli oyi-kit manager yeDurban City asewe evuka nayo iminyaka ewu-22 njengoba eseze wanqoba nayo indebe yeNedbank Cup UKUNQOBA indebe yeNedbank Cup kweDurban City kumele nakanjani kube yisikhuthazi  nesiqalo sezinto ezinhle emaqenjini aKwaZulu-Natal, adlala kwiBetway Premiership. Lowo ngumbono kaZola “Mzolisto” Luthuli oyi-kit manager yeDurban City engompetha besizini ka-2025/2026 beNedbank Cup ngokuguqisa i-TS Galaxy ngo 2-1 ngoMgqibelo, ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. ICity eqede isomiso seminyaka engu-17 sokunganqobi izindebe kwamaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal, yaqeda ishobolo leminyaka ewu-54 lokubhekwa yisambane kwamaqembu akulesi sifundazwe kwiNedbank kusukela wasungulwa ngo-1971, usabizwa nge-Life Challenge. “Le mpumelelo yeDurban City kumele nakanjani ibe yisikhuthazi emaqenjini aKwaZulu-Natal ekwenzeni okufanayo nawo njengoba sesenzile siyiDurban City ngokuwina le ndebe. "Sinamaqembu amane adlala kwiBetway Premiership, namabili adlala kwiMotsepe Championship, angingabazi ukuthi wonke la maqembu azokhuthazeka ekulweleni impumelelo ngokwehlukana kwawo,” kusho uLuthuli, osewe evuka naleli qembu iminyaka kusukela lisabizwa ngeMaritzburg United. “Empeleni kule sizini amaqembu aseKZN enza kahle njengoba lingekho nelilodwa phakathi kwawo elivika izembe okuyinto ebesesaziwa ngayo kumasizini edlule. Lokho kuyinkomba yokuthi kukhona lapho esiya khona njengesifundazwe. Njengamanje mathathu amaqembu aseKZN alwela ukuhlala kwi-Top 8, kanti iRichards Bay nayo iyangqongqoza.” AmaZulu asendaweni yesine, iCity isendaweni yesikhombisa, iLamontville Golden Arrows isendaweni yesishiyagalombili, kanti iRichards Bay FC isendaweni ka-11. ULuthuli (54), odabuka eMlaza, usesebenze njenge-kit manager iminyaka ecela ku-30. WayekwiManning Rangers ngo-1996, inqoba isicoco seligi. Wasebenza kwiSantos banqoba indebe yeBobsave Super Bowl ngaphansi kukaClive Barker, bazuza neligi beholwa nguGordon Igesund. Uthe le ndebe yeNedbank isho lukhulu kuyena ikakhulukazi njengoba esesebenze kwiCity iminyaka ecela ku-22. “NgoJuni, ngizobe ngihlanganisa iminyaka ewu-30 ngenza lo msebenzi engiwenzayo. Kodwa kwiDurban City sengisebenze isikhathi eside nayo kusukela ngiyijoyina ngo-2004, ngisuka kwiSantos. Ngakho le ndebe yeNedbank isho lukhulu kakhulu kimina ngoba ngiwe ngivuka nayo. Ngangikhona ngesizini ka-2006/07, sidliwa yizembe siphethe o-Onismor Bhasera noSteve Lekoelea. Ngangikhona futhi ibuyela kwiPremiership ngo-2008. Ngangikhona futhi nangesizini ka-2022/23 sidliwa yizembe, saphinda sabuya ngesizini edlule ka-2024/25. Ngaphezu kwalokho, isizinda saseChatsworth okuzinze kuso iCity sesifana nekhaya lami ngoba neManning Rangers engawina nayo iligi ngesizini ka-1996/97, yayidlalela khona imidlalo yasekhaya,” kuphetha uLuthuli owayeseqenjini leBafana Bafana elalikwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngo-2002, eKorea-Japan.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Usomatekisi waseMpumalanga Joe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni Image: Screenshot/TikTok Isikhulu samatekisi esidumile eMpumalanga, uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni, singomunye wabesilisa abathathu ababoshiwe esigamekweni esididiyelwe samaphoyisa sokuqola okuhlobene necala osekunesikhathi liqhubeka eKwaggafontein elibandakanya izinsolo zokusatshiswa kanye nezimfuno zezimali eziphindelelayo kusomabhizinisi. Uyamataniswa nezinsizwa okusolwa ukuthi ziyiqoqwana longongqondongqondo bobugebengu okubalwa kubo uVusimuzi ‘Cat’ Matlala. Laba nasolwa baneminyaka ephakathi kuka-46 no-60 baboshwe ezintatha zangoLwesibili eGauteng naseMpumalanga wuphiko lwamaphoyisa aphenya ubugebengu obuhleliwe. Okhulumela amaphoyisa esifundazweni, uColonel Malesela Masondo, uthe leli cala lisukela ezinsolweni zokuthi abasolwa bafuna imali kaningi kusomabhizinisi isikhathi eside ngaphambi kokuthi agcine elubika esiteshini samaphoyisa eKwaggafontein ngo-2025. Icala lidlulele ophikweni oluphenya amacala ahleliwe eMpumalanga, okuyilona elihole uphenyo kwabe sekuboshwa. UMasondo ukuqinisekisile ukuthi bobathathu abasolwa kulindeleke ukuba bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKwaggafontein ngoLwesithathu, Meyi 13, babhekene namacala okubamba inkunzi. Umsolwa oyedwa usagcwele amathafa. "Kukhona umsolwa oyedwa ongakaboshwa. Okwamanje amaphoyisa athi kungenzeka kwengezwe amanye amacala kubasolwa njengoba uphenyo lusaqhubeka." UMasondo uthe amayunithi ayisipesheli asebenzela ukuhlakaza amanethiwekhi okuqola futhi wanxusa izisulu ukuthi ziphumele obala.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ABAQEQESHI ababanjiswe umsebenzi kwiKaizer Chiefs uCedric Kaze noKhalil Ben Youssef NGAPHANSI kobuholi obubanjiswe uKhalil Ben Youssef waseTunisia noCedric Kaze waseBurundi, iKaizer Chiefs isemgqeni wokuqoqa isibalo samaphuzu esikhulu kunawo wonke amasizini kusukela yawina isicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership ngeka-2014-2015 iqeqeshwa nguStuart Baxter. Nakuba umgqigqo weChiefs wokungehlulwa emidlalweni eyisikhombisa yeligi unqanyulwe yiSiwelele FC ngoLwesithathu kodwa leli qembu laseNaturena lisenethuba lokuqeda isizini nesibalo samaphuzu osekuneminyaka engu-11 lagcina ukufika kusona. Ngesikhathi iChiefs imemezela ukuthi kuzoqhubeka uBen Youssef noKaze emuva kokuxosha uNasreddine Nabi, kwakuhlukene imibono ngenxa yamava alaba baqeqeshi abebefike omunye ezosiza lo mqeqeshi waseTunisia, omunye ezomtolikela. Njengoba isizini isiyela emaphethelweni, isinqumo seChiefs sokugcina uBen Youssef noKaze sibukeka njengesasiphusile ngenxa yendawo iqembu elikuyona kwi-log nesibalo samaphuzu. Kumasizini amabili adlule, iChiefs ihlulwe wukungena kwi-Top 8 kodwa kulokhu isibalwa namaqembu azodlala kwiMTN8 ngesizini ezayo ekubeni isasalelwe yimidlalo emine kuphele isizini yePremiership. Ngaphezu kwalokho, inethuba lokubuyela kwiCaf Confederation eyidlale kule sizini ngenxa yokuwina iNedbank Cup ngedlule. UBen Youssef noKaze basemgqeni wokwedlula ngisho isibalo samaphuzu angu-57 iChiefs eyawaqoqa iholwa ngu-Ernst Middendorp ngesikhathi idedela isicoco seligi ngosuku lokugcina ngesizini ka-2019-2020. Lokhu kuqubula umbuzo ngekusasa likaBen Youssef noKaze kuMakhosi kwazise abazobe bekwenzile kwehlule inqwaba yabaqeqeshi abahlonishwayo ebholeni laseNingizimu Afrika. Uma iChiefs iyinqoba yonke imidlalo eyisalele izoqeqa inamaphuzu angu-59 okuzobe kuyisibalo esenza uKaze noBen Youssef babengcono kunoSteve Komphela (50), Giovani Solinas/Middendorp (39), Gavin Hunt (36), uStuart Baxter esebuya ihlandla lesibili (47), Arthur Zwane (44), Molefi Ntseki/Cavin Johnson noNabi (32). Kusukela kwiChiefs kaBaxter yango-2014/2015 eyaqeda isizini inamaphuzu angu-69, akekho omunye umqeqeshi oseke wasondela kulokhu ngaphandle kukaMiddendorp owaphoxeka nabalandeli ngo-2019/2020. Imidlalo emine esalele uKaze noBen Youssef ingase ibe nomthelela ngezinqumo ezinzima okufanele zithathwe ngabaphathi baleli qembu laseNaturena. Nakuba kunjalo kodwa konke kulele ekutheni iChiefs yenzenjani kweyisalele neMamelodi Sundowns, Sekhukhune United naMaZulu FC ekuhambeni ngaphambi kokusonga ekhaya ngeChippa United.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ekhuluma nabadlali bakhe ngesikhathi bebhekene neKaizer Chiefs KASISEKHO isidingo nesikhathi sokuthi abadlali be-Orlando Pirates banake okushiwo ngabo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngoba ukuqhuzuka kwabo kwiKaizer Chiefs kuncane kakhulu uma kuqhathaniswa nethuba lokuphothula umsebenzi omuhle abawuqale ngo-Agasti, nyakenye, abami phambi kwalo. Lawa ngamazwi enkuthazo ashiwo ngumqeqeshi wePirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ewabhekise kubadlali bakhe ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba abenesithangami nabo kulandela ukubambana neChiefs ngo 1-1 emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngeSonto e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. Lo mphumela uyiphazamisile iPirates esemjahweni wesicoco seligi oshubile neMamelodi Sundowns. Nakuba iPirates isaqhwakele kodwa ihleli ngesinqe esisodwa esicongweni njengoba inamaphuzu angu-59 okuyenza ibe ngcono ngelilodwa kwiSundowns esele ngomdlalo nelele isibili (58). Emuva komdlalo wabakhaya, umuzwa obuqhamuka ekhempini yePirates ubukhomba ukuphoxeka kwazise leli qembu lifike lithwelwe ngeqoma njengoba lisanda kuxebula iChiefs ngo 3-0. “Isikhathi esiphila kusona siyaphoqa ukuthi ngivikele abadlali bami kukona konke okuzoshiwo ngabo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngenxa yomphumela esiwuthole kwiChiefs,” kusho u-Ouaddou. “Ngiyazi ukuthi ngeke ngibavimbe abasho konke abakuthandayo ngePirates ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kodwa okufanele kwaziwe ngabadlali bami ngukuthi ngiyaziqhenya ngabo. “Ngeke ngivume ukuthi umsebenzi wabo ongaka abawenze kusukela kuqala isizini ukuthi ushatshalaliswe yimibhalo engasho lutho ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. “Ukube nginamandla ngabe ngithi abadlali bami ake baphume ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kuze kube siyawuqeda umsebenzi osihlalele. “Ngeke siliphonse ithawula kuze kube sekugcineni ngisho singaqhuzuka kaningi kangakanani. “Konke okwenzeka kithina yingoba kufanele ngakho-ke ngeke kubasize abadlali ukunaka okushiwo ngabo ngenxa yokuqhuzuka,” kusho u-Ouaddou. Ngesikhathi iPirates ibuyela enkundleni ngokubhekana neStellenbosch FC ngoMeyi 5 - iSundowns ematasa nangamalungiselelo omdlalo wamanqamu weCaf Champions League - iyobe isidlale ekhaya nasekuhambeni nePolokwane City.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ISIKOLE iMaphephetha High, eMatata, eNanda, sithungelwe ngomlilo BUSADIDEKILE ubuholi besikole imaphephetha High, ematata, enanda, kulandela isigameko sokungqongqiswa kwenye ingxenye yaso ngolwesihlanu. Emlilweni okuthiwa ubonwe omakhelwane ezintatha, kushiswe ihhovisi likathishanhloko, elephini lakhe, amane ama-head of department nekilasi elilodwa elincikene nompheme okungqongqiswe imoto ebisetshenziswa abafundi abenza izifundo zokukhenikha. Usihlalo wesigungu sesikole, umnuz Mzokhona Khumalo, uthe basashayisana ngamakhanda ngokuthi ubani lo obenesifiso sokucekela phansi isikole. “Kusobala ukuthi umlilo uthungelwe umuntu futhi sisola ukuthi ubesebenzisa ibhomu likaphethroli. Okusididayo ukuthi ukwenze lokhu nganhlosoni ngoba azikho izinxushunxushu esikoleni. Othisha bonke bayezwana, iSGB nayo iyezwana. Akukho muntu onanxa nomunye,” kusho uKhumalo. Uthe kuningi okumqoka okubalahlekele ngaphakathi emagunjini ashisiwe. Phakathi kwakho ubale ama-riphothi abafundi abequkethe imiphumela yabo yokuphela kwesigaba sokuqala sonyaka, athe bebezonikwa wona maduze. Uphinde wabala nemishini emithathu yokufothokhopha, amaphepha abalulekile abafundi, izincwadi kanjalo nazo zonke ezinye izinsizakusebenza ezisetshenziswa othisha uma befundisa. “Sife olwembiza futhi asikazi nokuthi izothini indlela eya phambili. Abahloli bafikile ngosuku lwesigameko, bafike babuka umonakalo, babhala phansi abakubonile. Thina sizoba nomhlangano sodwa kusasa (esho namuhla) bese sibiza owabazali bonke maduze,” kusho uKhumalo. Uthe ukufunda nokufundisa akukazoqhubeka ngoba umonakalo ucekele phansi zonke izinsizakusebenza zawo wonke amabanga esikole. Udalule ukuthi uthole ucingo lumbizela esigamekweni ngo-5:45 ekuseni, wathatha imizuzu engu-15 ukuthi afike khona. Uthe ufike kukhombisa ukuthi imoto isishe yangqongqa kanti kulawa amanye amahhovisi, umlilo ubusha ngaphakathi ungakaphumeli ngaphandle. Umthombo weSolezwe, uthe kwenzeka lesi sigameko nje, kunesonto kukhishwe wonke amafasitela emakilasini angomahamba nendlwana esikoleni. Uveze ukuthi ngasekuqaleni konyaka, kukhona umuntu owahamba wathwebula isikole, maqede wakhenikha isithombe nge-Artificial Interligence (AI), sakhombisa isikole sisha, wase esinameka ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. “Kwathi uma kugijinywa kuyiwa esikoleni, kwatholakala ukuthi asinalutho. Akuzange kunakwe lutho ngaleso sikhathi kodwa sekuyacaca manje ukuthi leso senzo sasixoxa indaba,” kusho umthombo, othe ayinuki ingosiwe. Uphinde wadalula eyokuthi kukhona umoya wokudayiswa kwezikhala zokufundisa kulesi sikole, okuthiwa sinezikhala zothisha ezimbili. Nokho uthe akekho ofuna ukuphumela obala ngaleyo ndaba, okusolakala ukuthi ingahle ibe yisizathu sokushiswa kwesikole. AboMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal - kweminye imithombo yabezindaba - baveze ukuthi banalo ulwazi ngesigameko, bathi sithikameze ukufunda nokufundisa.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UTEBOHO Mokoena weMamelodi Sundows eshikilisana noMpho Mvelase emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, izolo ebusuku IMAMELODI Sundowns izifake engcupheni yokuphunyukwa yisicoco seBetway Premiership ishaywa yi-TS Galaxy ngo 3-2 koweligi eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, ngoLwesibili ebusuku Amagoli eGalaxy ashaywe nguVictor Letsoalo okube yiphenathi, Sedwyn George ngesiwombe sokuqala, noMpho Mvelase ngesibili. AweSundonwns ashaywa uBrayan Leon womabili angene ngesiwombe sokuqala okubalwa nephenathi ayishaye sekusele imizuzu embalwa kuyiwe ekhefini. Lokhu sekusho ukuthi eZimnyama ezisendaweni yesibili ngamaphuzu awu-65, sezidinga ukushaya iDurban City ngoMgqibelo e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, ziqukule isicoco seligi. Uma zihluleke lapho zinelinye ithuba njengoba zizobhekana ne-Orbit College ngoMeyi 23. . Yize iSundowns yenze izinguquko emuva kulo mdlalo iqalisa uKegan Johannes endaweni kaKhulumani Ndamane owenze amaphutha emdlalweni wangoMgqibelo iwina ngo 7-4 kwiSiwelele kodwa buphinde bagqama ukuthaka odongeni lwayo. Zibuya nje ekhefini iGalaxy ithole igoli lesithathu uMvelase ethola ibhola engamakwe muntu ngomzuzu ka-46. Ngemuva kokungenelwa yileli goli lesithathu kweSundowns, yenze izinguquko ezisheshaya iphinde ibuyisa uNdamane odongeni lwasemuva engena endaweni kaGrant Kekana, yafaka noTashreeq Mathews noMiguele Reisinho ezindaweni zo-Arthur Sales noMarcelo Allende. Nokho lokhu akuwenzanga umehluko kwazise iGalaxy iphumelele ukumaka kwaze kwaphela umdlalo. AmaSandawana azodlala ne-Esperance kowomlenze wokuqala wamanqamu weCaf Champions League ngeSonto ngo-4 ntambama.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMFU Muhle Mzokhona Zondi ohlele inkonzo ezohlanganisa amabutho nabazalwane KULINDELEKE abaholi bomphakathi nezinduna zamabutho enkonzweni esesigodini saseKupholeni, ngasesikoleni iMehlwenkosi Primary, kwaSwayimani, eMgungundlovu ngoMeyi 10 kusukela ngo-9 ekuseni. Umgqugquzeli wale nkonzo, uMfu Muhle Mzokhona Zondi, uthe inhlosongqangi ukuzozethula kubazalwane njengoba eseqokwe njengenduna yezinsizwa. UZondi, onguMengameli webandla iChristian Zion Church in South Africa, uthe uzobe azisa abazalwane ukuthi usezosheba ivangeli nobunsizwa. "Ngifuna amakholwa angathuki uma ezwa ukuthi ngihamba nezinsizwa. Ngalolu suku ngizobe ngizoveza obala ukuthi ngibuye ngihambe namabutho." UZondi uthe kule nkonzo kulindeleke abazalwane basenkonzweni yakhe nabakwamanye amabandla. Kubaholi athe bazohambela inkonzo kukhona iMeya kaMasipala uMnuz Mandla Zondi, ikhansela laku-ward 11 uMnuz Mthokozisi Mbhele, abadidiyeli bezinsizwa uMnuz Sifafa Nyoka, Mnuz Musa Luthuli noMnuz Jefrey Mthembu, izinduna uMnuz Gendezi Shangase, Mnuz Mndeni Gwala noMnuz Njeza Ngcobo kanye noSomlomo eMkhandlwini waseMgungundlovu futhi onguNobhala we-ANC Women's League KwaZulu-Natal uNkk Nonhlanhla Gabela. "Sizobuye sikhulekele ukuphela kwezingozi zomgwaqo ngenxa yokuthi zidlula nemiphefumulo eminingi kulezi zinsuku. Njengoba uMengameli wezwe esememezele usuku loKhetho loHulumeni baseKhaya olungoNovemba 4, nalo sizolubeka kuMdali ukuze kuheleze umoya wokuthula noxolo ezindaweni ezikuMasipala waseMshwathi," kuphetha uZondi.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe U-AKANI Simbine osingathe ngempumelelo iSimbine Classic, ePitoli, usebheke ukuyoyibamba kowe-World Relay Championships, eGaborone, eBotswana, ngempelasonto INSEPHE yomgijimi webanga lika-100m, u-Akani Simbine, ikuqinisekisile ukuthi izobe iyibambe kwi-World Relay Championships ezobanjelwa eBotswana, kule mpelasonto. USimbine (32) ongumsunguli nomhleli weSimbine Classic, okungumjaho wohlobo lwe-track and field ogijinywe okokuqala nonyaka ePilditch Stadium, ePitoli, ngoLwesibili, uzwakalise injabulo nomunyu ngempumelelo yalo mjaho odonse abagijimi abaseqopheleni eliphezulu nezibukeli ebeziphume ngobuningi ukuzowethamela. Uthe okuqale njengephupho kuyena kugcine sekuba yindumezulu yomqhudelwano ogqugquzele abantu abaningi baseNingizimu Afrika ukuthi bakholelwe emaphusheni abo. “Ngijabule ukuthi ube yimpumelelo lo mjaho. Bekugcwele kuchichima ezihlalweni yizibukeli, izingane zibone amaphupho azo efezeka, nabagijimi bakithi bathola ithuba lokuncintisana nezihlabani zabagijimi bamazwe,” kusho uSimbine, oveze isifiso sakhe sokuletha i-Diamond League eNingizimu Afrika ngelinye ilanga. “Ngibonga kakhulu kuwona wonke umuntu ngokukholelwa kuleli phupho lami nokwazi ukuthi into enjengalena ingenzeka. Nginethemba lokuthi singawukhulisa lo mjaho. Lesi kuyesiqalo nje.” Kulo mjaho uSimbine ushaye isikhathi esiwu-9.98 seconds kowandulela owamanqamu ku-100m, okuyisikhathi esimsize ekuzibekiseleni indawo kuma-Commonwealth Games azobanjelwa eGlasgow, eScotland, ngoJulayi 23 kuya ku-Agasti 2. Nakuba uSimbine ehlulekile ukuwunqoba lo mjaho njengoba ephume ekugcineni kowamanqamu ka-100m onqotshwe ngu-Emanuel Eseme waseCameroon, ukuqinisekisile ukuthi uzoyibamba kwi-World Relay Championships ezobanjelwa eGaborone, eBotswana, ngoMgqibelo kuze kube yiSonto. Ukusho lokhu ngemuva kokuba ephume eseqhuga, kunokwesabela ukuthi ulimele. Nokho ukuqinisekisile ukuthi ubebanjwe ngamajaqamba nje. “Akukho okutheni, amajaqamba nje. Indlela engiqale ngayo umjaho iwunyakazile umzimba wami, emva kwalokho wenqaba nokuyilapho engiqale khona ukubanjwa ngamajaqamba. "Ngiyazi ukuthi ama-World Relays ayeza, yingakho ngiqede umjaho (Simbine Classic) sengizigijimela kancane ngoba bengifuna ukwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi umzimba ukahle. Umzimba udinga ukululama.” Kwi-World Relay, uSimbine neqembu lakhe lika-4x10mm banenselelo yokuvikela isicoco abasinqobe nyakenye eGuangzhou, eChina. KwiSimbine Classic, uPrudence Sekgodiso, udle umhlanganiso kwabesifazane kowamanqamu ka-1500m ngesikhathi sika-4 min, 08.93sec, eshiya uKarabo More kwathi uTshepo Tshite wadla umhlanganiso ku-300m kwabesilisa eshiya uLuan Munnik ngesikhathi sika-7min 54.05sec.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: USOMATEKISI uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni nasolwa nabo uMvimbi Daniel Masilela noPhilemon Msiza besenkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein Image: Oupa Mokoena / Independent Newspapers “MINA ngiyinceku kaNkulukulu”, kusho uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni etshela abezindaba ukuthi umsulwa ngesikhathi evele enkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein, eMpumalanga. USibanyoni uvele nabanye abasolwa okunguMvimbi Daniel Masilela noPhilemon Msiza ngamacala okuqola namabili okushushumbisa imali. Icala elibhekene nosomatekisi uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni livele lashuba ngemuva kokuthi ummeli wakhe uShaun Abrahams SC owayeyisikhulu seNPA, esole uMbuso ngokungazimiseli ngesikhathi ufaka isicelo sokuhlehlisa inqubo yesicelo sebheyili. Abashushisi batshele inkantolo ukuthi uphenyo lusaqhubeka futhi kusadingeka isikhathi sokuqoqa ubufakazi. UMbuso uphinde waveza ukuthi isicelo sebheyili singase singaqhubeki ngoba imantshi obekulindeleke ukuthi ilalele lolu daba ibingakatholakali. U-Abrahams ukuphikisile lokhu wathi uMbuso uhlulekile ukuzilungiselela ngendlela yize uphenyo seludonse isikhathi eside. U-Abrahams uphinde waqondisa abashushisi enkantolo, wathi lolu daba lungaphansi kwesigaba 5 hhayi u-6 we-Criminal Procedure Act. UMbuso uphinde wagxekwa ngokungabanikezi abameli babasolwa uhlu lwamacala Imantshi u-J.T. Erasmus ibuze abashushisi ukuthi ngabe uhlu lwamacala ludluliselwe yini ku-Abrahams. UMbuso uvumile ukuthi awuzange. U-Abrahams utshele inkantolo ukuthi uyayidinga incwadi ukuze aqhubeke nesicelo sebheyili. Inkantolo iluhlehlisele uLwesihlanu lolu daba.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI weKaizer Chiefs, uGlody Lilepo ecela indlela ku-Omega Mdaka weStellenbosch FC emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eFNB Stadium, eNasrec, ngoLwesibili ebusuku Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX IKAIZER Chiefs iphunyukwe yithuba lokubhekana ne-Orlando Pirates ishayela phezulu ngokwehlulwa yiStellenbosch FC emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eFNB Stadium, eNasrec, ngoLwesibili ebusuku. IChiefs ihambe phambili ngegoli likaFlavio da Silva esiwombeni sokuqala emdlalweni obekubukeka izowunqoba ngendlela ebigeleza ngayo. Nokho bakucishe konke lokho uLangelihle Phili noDevin Titus beshayela iStellies amagoli esiwombeni sesibili. Ngaphandle kokuthi iChiefs iphunyukwe yithuba lokwenyukela endaweni yesithathu kwi-log yePremiership, ukuwina bekuzoyenza ibhekane nePirates emdlalweni wabakhaya eFNB Stadium ngoMgqibelo inomfutho. IPirates isazikhotha amanxeba kulandela ukukhala ngaphansi kwiCasric Stars emdlalweni we-Last 16 yeNedbank Cup ngempelasonto edlule. Lokhu kusho ukuthi inengcindezi yokwehlula iChiefs ukuze izobuyisa ithemba kubalandeli kwazise isishaywe emidlalweni emibili ilandelana. Ngemuva kowehlulwa yiStellies, umqeqeshi weChiefs uKhalil Ben Youssef, uthe bekufanele baqede ngeStellies esiwombeni sokuqala. "Uma uwuphethe umdlalo esiwombeni sokuqala, kufanele uqede. Uma ungakwenzi lokho kwenzeka lokhu okwenzeke kwesesibili. Ngicabanga ukuthi kufanele siwavume amaphutha kwesinye isikhathi. Kufanele sixolile kubalandeli. Sinezinsuku ezintathu ukucabanga ngomdlalo olandelayo. Uma uthola amathuba ayisikhombisa uwashweba wonke, ngisho kungekho muntu epalini uhlulwa wukushaya igoli, sizokwenzani emuva kwalokho?," kusho uBen Youssef oqeqesha ngokubambisana noCedric Kaze. Laba baqeqeshi bazohlala ebhentshini kowabakhaya okokuqala engasekho uNasreddine Nabi abebengamaphini akhe. Ngesikhathi iChiefs igcina ukubhekana nePirates emdlalweni wamanqamu weNedbank Cup ngoMeyi, inqobe ngo 2-1.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ABADLALI beKaizer Chiefs uGlody Lilepo noMduduzi Shabalala bejabula noFlavio Da Silva oshaye igoli lokuqala ngesikhathi behlula i-Al Masry emdlalweni weCaf Confederation Cup ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngeSonto Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI weKaizer Chiefs, uKhalil Ben Youssef, udalule ukuthi kudingeke bahlale phansi nabadlali ngabodwa ukuze bakudlulise ukwehlulwa kwabo yiStellenbosch FC kwiNedbank Cup ngaphambi kokubhekana ne-Al Masry yase-Egypt kwiCaf Confederation Cup. IChiefs yehlule i-Al Masry ngo 2-1 emdlalweni wesihlanu kaGroup D, yahlala esicongweni  ngamaphuzu angu-10. Isidinga ukubuya nephuzu kwiZamalek emdlalweni wokusonga isigaba samaqoqo ekuhambeni ngeSonto ukuze idlulele kuma-quarterfinal. IChiefs idlale ne-Al Masry ikade iphoxe abalandeli bayo maphakathi nesonto eledlule ikhishwa yiStellies kwi-Last 32 yeNedbank Cup okuwumqhudelwano ewunqobile ngesizini edlule. UKhalil opheka iChiefs ngokubambisana noCedric Kaze, uthe basebenze kanzima ukuze abadlali badlale oweCaf sebesesimeni esihle ngokomqondo. "Bekuwumdlalo onzima kithina ngoba besithole umphumela omubi. Bekunzima emiqondweni kubadlali futhi sithathe isikhathi eside sixoxa nabadlali ngabodwana sibagqugquzela. Manje sesiwuqedile umdlalo futhi siseqhulwini eqoqweni. Ukuze sidlulele phambili sidinga ukuya e-Egypt siyolwela amaphuzu amathathu noma elilodwa. Bonke abadlali bayabazi ubumqoka balo mdlalo. Sidlala yonke imidlalo njengeyamanqamu. Kufanele siqhubeke nokusebenza kanzima, sibuye sidlulele kuma-quarterfinal," kusho uKhalil. Ukuphuma kweChiefs kwiNedbank kusho ukwehla komthwalo kuleli qembu elilwela ukuzuza okungcono kule sizini. Amakhosi asezogxila kwiConfederation Cup nakwiBetway Premiership. UKhalil ukhale ngokuxinwa ngemidlalo kwaMakhosi ekubeni kukhona amaqembu athize abecatshangelwa ngesikhathi edlala imidlalo yeCaf ngesizini edlule. Uthe abasakwazi nokuziqeqesha ngenxa yokudlala njalo. "Simele iNingizimu Afrika…yini engiyicelayo? Sikwenzile lokhu ngesizini edlule, amanye amaqembu agcina ukudlala imidlalo eyisihlanu, eyisithupha ngoMeyi. Kule sizini sidlale imidlalo engu-15. Elinye iqembu engingeke ngilisho igama lalo lidlale engu-15 futhi alidlali (kwiCaf).Uma simele iKaizer Chiefs, simele iKaizer Chiefs kodwa uma simele iNingizimu Afrika, simele iNingizimu Afrika,"usho kanje.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: Ngizwe Mchunu NGIZWE MCHUNU Image: Itumeleng English AKWAZIWA ukuthi iyozala nkomoni engxabanweni yomholi we-EFF uMnuz Julius Malema nowayengumsakazi woKhozi FM kodwa osengumengameli wamabhinca, uNgizwe "Zulu Charmer" Mchunu, njengoba sesiphelile isikhathi ebesinqunyelwe uNgizwe sokuba axolise kuMalema. NgoLwesine abameli bakaMalema, i-England Slabbert Attorneys Inc, banqumele uNgizwe ugwayi katiki ukuba ahoxise inkulumo yakhe ngoMalema futhi axolise esidlangalaleni kulo mholi, aphinde athumele isitatimende emithonjeni yezindaba bese ehlawula uMalema ngesamba sika-R1 million kungakapheli amahora awu-24 kusukela ngoLwesine. Abameli bathe uma lokhu abakubalile kungenzeki, noma kanjani bazomthathela izinyathelo zomthetho. Bathe le ndaba isukela engxoxweni kaNgizwe noKing Zoso ngaphandle kwase-Union Buildings ePitoli ngoLwesine. "Le ngxoxo iphindiwe nakwezinye izinkundla zokuxhumana okubalwa kuzo i-X neTikTok." Abameli bakhala ngokuthi uNgizwe waqambela uMalema amanga ngokuthi wamukela isamba sika-R60 million kumshushumbisi wezidakamizwa waseNigeria, uvikela abantu bangaphandle abakuleli ngokungemthetho ukuze azuze futhi ubandakanyeka enkohlakalweni nasebugebengwini. "Le nkulumo yamanga, iyalimaza futhi icekela phansi isithunzi sakhe njengelungu lePhalamende nomholi wepolitiki," kusho incwadi yabameli. Eziphendulela esithangamini semithombo yezindaba, uNgizwe uthe akasoze yena athuswa wuMalema ngoba useyinyoka efile futhi engeke iphinde ivuke. "Akahambe aye jele, aphume. Walahla ithuba lokuba ashintshe ukuphathwa kwezwe kodwa wadakwa wumbuso. Wanyanya uZulu. Waphinda wathatha imali ko-OnPoint Engineering. Balutha i-VBS bayiqeda nya. Bangena Ekurhuleni bashaya babhuqa. Anginandaba ngisho noma engenzani, uyinyoka efile." UNgizwe uthe isikhathi sikaMalema siphelile manje, wamsola ngokuthi udayise ngabantu baseNingizimu Afrika kubantu bokufika. Ebuzwa ukuthi uzoya yini enkantolo uma ebizwa, uNgizwe uthe ngeke aze awubeke owakhe umcondo lapho. "Ngiyinsizwa yakwaZulu. Uma engifuna uyongithola eNkandla." Uthe ofuna ukuza kuye engamthumelela i-location. "Asisekho isikhathi sokudlala. UJulius Malema uyi-political devil.  Osopolitiki bayamesaba noMengameli uyamesaba. Asimesabi thina, yinja nje. Yithi esiphethe manje futhi sizolithatha leli zwe siliqondise liqonde ngqo." Uthe izwe lifile ngenxa yezidakamizwa notshwala obubulala intsha. "Izingane zethu zidakwa ubusuku nemini. Zidayisa ngemizimba. Yihlazo elenzeka kuleli zwe," kusho uNgizwe. Yize kungokokuqala bebophana kodwa uMalema noNgizwe abaqali ukuxabana.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: KWEHLE izinyembezi kuThembisani Mntungwa othweswe iminyezane ephethe isikibha esinomyalezo wokukhumbula unina osanda kushona SIKHETHE ukukhumbula unina ongasekho ngokuthi sinyukele esteji sabagqokiswa iminyezane siphethe isikibha esibhalwe umyalezo ngokushona kwakhe, isitshudeni saseNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, ebesithweswa iziqu ngoLwesihlanu. UThembisani Mntungwa okhulele eMalukazi, ngaseSipingo, uthweswa iziqu zeBachelor of Social Science in Criminology and Forensic Studies nje, akukapheli nezinyanga ezimbili unina, uNksz Nondumiso Mntungwa (40), amshiyile emhlabeni. Isikibha abesiphethe esinesithombe sikanina besikhombisa ukuthi uhambe emhlabeni ngoMashi 21, nonyaka. Besibhalwe umyalezo othi: “Umuntu obehlale engigqugquzela ukubadlula bonke. Njengamanje usuyingelosi engigadile. Mama uyisizathu ngilana namuhla.” Elandisa ngokushona kukanina, uthe kushiye esikhulu isikhala. “Ngifisa sengathi ubekhona ukuthi siwujabulele ndawonye lo mzuzu. Sasiwuhlelele, saxoxa ngokuthi sizowubungaza kanjani. Ubengumama wami, engumngani futhi engeseka kakhulu,” kusho uMntungwa. Uthe ngokuya esteji nesikibha esinalo myalezo, ubefuna ukuthi umhlaba wonke wazi ukuthi iziqu zakhe, kahle hle zingezikanina. Ekhumbula okunye, uthe unina wadela okuningi ukuqinisekisa ukuthi yena nezingane zakwabo ezintathu ezimlamayo banakekelwa ngendlela eyiyo. “Ubengumsebenzi wasendlini, kuthi ngezinye izikhathi, ahambe ayodayisa emgwaqweni ukuqinisekisa ukuthi sihlale sinakho ukudla kanjalo nemali yokuphatha esikoleni,” kukhumbula uMntungwa. Uthe nangesikhathi eseqale ukuqhuba izifundo zakhe enyuvesi, unina ubehlale emshayela ucingo embheka ukuthi kuhamba kanjani, ambuze ngamamaki akhe. “Lezo bekuyizinto ezincane ebezibalulekile kimina, kuthi ngezikhathi ezinzima, lapho sengifuna ukuyeka, ngivele ngikhumbule ukuthi nginomuntu ekhaya okholelwa kakhulu kimi futhi oziqhenyayo ngami, ofuna ukungibona ngizithola lezi ziqu, ngiba yisifundiswa,” usho kanje. Ngesikhathi ezothweswa iziqu, ubekhashwe nguyise kanjalo noninakhulu.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: no NFP new member4.jpg UMNZ Sipho Mbatha Image: NQOBILE MBONAMBI SEKUQUBUKE imvunge kwi-NFP kulandela amahlebezi okuthi osanda kuxoshwa yi-IFP kwesobukhansela, uMnuz Sipho Mbatha, ugixabezwe ngesikhundla esibalulekile kuleli qembu eligubuzelwe izimpi zangaphakathi. Amalungu eqembu anganelisekile akhala ngokunikwa kukaMbatha isikhundla sikaNational Organizer. Amahlebezi okuthi uMbatha unikwe isikhundla abhebhetheke emva kokuba kusabalale incwadi okuthiwa ibhalwe uyena lapho azisa khona amalungu eNFP ngomcimbi ozohanjelwa umholi weqembu, uMnuz Ivan Barnes. Kule ncwadi uMbatha uzibiza ngo-National Organizer. UMbatha usanda kuxoshwa ekubeni ikhansela le-IFP kuMasipala wesifunda iKing Cetshwayo. UMbatha waxoshelwa izinsolo zokuthi ubenobulungu bamaqembu amabili kanye nezinsolo zokugwazisa abantu ayebathembisa umsebenzi namathenda kwamasipala. Amalungu anganelisekile athe ukunikwa kukaMbatha isikhundla kuphambene nemigomo yeqembu. Ilungu elicele ukuba igama lalo lingadalulwa lithe imigomo yeNFP ikubeka kucace ukuthi umuntu kufanele abe ilungu leqembu iminyaka emihlanu ngaphambi kokuthi anikwe isikhundla. "Kazi kuyoze kube nini izikhundla zinikwa abantu abafikayo eqenjini? UMbatha asimazi nokuthi ujoyine nini njengoba esenikwa isikhundla. Mina ngamgcina eyikhansela le-IFP ngiyathuka namhlanje uma sengizwa kuthiwa usenikwe isikhundla esikhulu kangaka. Ingoba bebengekho yini abanye abantu abebengaqokwa?" Umholi uthe uMbatha washiya onile kwiNFP njengoba esenikwa isikhundla nje. "Ngesikhathi iNFP iphuma kwi-IFP, saphuma naye. Wasishiya simanxebanxeba, waphindela kwi-IFP. Namhlanje uzonikwa isikhundla. Kaze uzobenza njani labantu ashiye ebaqolile kwi-IFP?" Omunye umholi uthe ukunikwa kwabantu izikhundla ngendlela engaqondakali kwenza ukuthi amalungu eqembu aphelelwe umdlandla. "Icobana amathambo le ndaba yabantu abanikwa izikhundla ngendlela engaqondakali futhi yenza ukuthi kube nzima ukuthi amalungu eNFP abamukele. Nabo nje abasebenzi ngokukhululeka ngoba basuke belandelwa izinkulumo." Unobhala jikelele weNFP, uMnuz Sunset Xaba, uthe abakaze bamqoke uMbatha. UXaba uthe bayibonile incwadi okuthiwa ibhalwe uMbatha kodwa wathi abazi ukuthi ubenikezwe ubani igunya lokuthi ayibhale. "Akayena u-organizer wembu. Thina u-organizer esinaye uBawinile Mhlongo. Asikaze simqoke loyo Mbatha, angimazi nangokumbona. Angimazi ukuthi ubethunywe ubani ukuthi abhale leyo ncwadi." UXaba uthe uMbatha wayephethe lesi sikhundla ngesikhathi kusekhona umsunguli weqembu, uNkk Zanele kaMagwaza-Msibi. Imizamo yokuthola ukuphawula kukaMbatha ayizange iphumelele njengoba ucingo lwakhe belukhala lungangeni futhi engazange ayiphendule imibuzo ayithunyelwe.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UDJ Tira, oqhulula inqwaba yezingoma zeGqom - okuvela ukuthi yilona elingase ligcina lihamba phambili ngokulalelwa kakhulu ezweni eminyakeni ezayo INDLELA okulalelwa nokuthengwa umculo ngayo nsuku zonke ikhomba ukuthi umculo weGqom yiwona ozogcina uqengeleza phambili ngokulalelwa nangokuthengwa kakhulu eNingizimu Afrika. Lokho kushiwo yiNhloko yoPhiko lwezamaCiko nokuSebenzisana eSpotify, uMnuz Henco Harmse - akusho ngenkathi ekhuluma kwesinye sezigcawu zokucobelana ngolwazi lwezobuciko ebesenzwe yile nkampani eGoli kuleli sonto. UHarmse uthe lokhu kudalwa wukwanda kwabantu abathakasela lo mculo minyaka yonke, okufakazelwa wukukhula kwezibalo zokulalelwa kwawo ngo-92% kusuka eminyakeni emihlanu edlule kuze kuzoba yimanje. UMCULI we-pop uTyla wuyena osazihola phambili ngokulalelwa kakhulu kwiSpotify “Okunye futhi esikuqaphelayo ngezibalo zabantu abalalela umculo kwiSpotify wukuthi eminyakeni emihlanu edlule kuze kuzoba yimanje kukhule ngo-450% ukulalelwa komculo nje jikelele emazweni ehlukene ase-Afrika, okuyisimo esihle nesizosiza kakhulu amaciko, usho kanje. Eqhuba, uthe okunye abakuqaphelile wukuthi umculo wama-piano nawo ungeminye yemiculo elokhu yenza kahle kakhulu njengoba kule minyaka emihlanu ukhombe ukwenyuka ngo-98%, okukhomba ukuthi ukhula ngokuphindaphindiwe njalo ngonyaka. “Singekushiye ngaphandle nokuthi umculo wesintu umaskandi nawo ugila izimanga emakethe njengoba ikhule ngo-174% indlela olalelwa ngawo kwiSpotify kule minyaka emihlanu edlule kuze kuzoba yimanje,” kusho uHarmse. UMCULI kamaskandi Umafikizolo ngelinye lamaciko okuvela ukuthi enze kahle kakhulu kwiSpotify ngonyaka odlule IMenenja yoPhiko lwezamaCiko, iziTebele zomCulo nokuSebenzisana eSpotify, uNksz Jodie Tabisher, yona idalule ukuthi okunye okugqamile ngenkathi becwaninga izibalo zabo wukuthi umculi kamaskandi Umafikizolo ugile izimanga nyakenye ngengoma yakhe ethi Uyoncengwa Unyoko edobe abantu abangaphezu kwa-15 million ukuyilalela. UNksz Tabisher udalule nokuthi umculi we-pop uTyla wuyena olokhu ehambe phambili njalo ngokulalelwa nokuthengwa kakhulu komculo wakhe kusuka ngo-2023 kuze kuzoba yimanje, okufakazelwa wukuthi ingoma yakhe yango-2023 ethi Water, isilalelwe ngaphezu kwa-100 million. “Okunye esikuqaphelile nesikushayela ihlombe elikhulu wukukhula kwesibalo sabantu abalalela umculo weRn’B yakuleli zwe, obekukade kungavamile ukwenzeka kule minyaka edlule njengoba abantu bebethanda ukulalelwa amaciko aphesheya kwezilwandle enza lolu hlobo lomculo, osekujikile manje njengoba sebegxile kowamaciko abo,” kusho yena.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa UMENGAMELI, Cyril Ramaphosa, uvulelwe elinye icala elithinta udaba lokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe iPhala Phala. I-ActionSA ivulele uRamaphosa icala imsola ngokuthi waqamba amanga ngesikhathi edalula isamba semali eyalahleka epulazini lakhe. USotswebhu we-ActionSA, uNkk Lerato Ngobeni, uthe kunobufakazi obukhomba ukuthi inkulu kakhulu imali eyantshontshwa kunalena eyashiwo uRamaphosa. URamaphosa wadalula ukuthi kwantshontshwa u-580 000 wamadola aseMelika, nokusho ukuthi imali elinganiselwa ku-R10 million uma ibuyiselwa emalini yakuleli. UNkk Ngobeni uthe ubufakazi bakamumva bukhomba ukuthi imali eyantshontshwa ayikho ngaphansi kuka-R15 million. UNkk Ngobeni uthe kungavela okushaqisayo ngesamba semali eyantshontshwa uma kungase kuqhubeke kuphenywe. "Siyiqaphelile imibiko ethi iNational Prosecuting Authority (NPA) nayo ishaya amakhala ngesamba esalahleka. INPA iqale ukushaya amakhala emva kokuphenya ngemali eyayiphuma ingena kwi-akhawunti yomunye wabantu ababoshelwe ukuntshontsha imali epulazini likaRamaphosa. Kuningi okungavela uma kungase kuphenywe ngemali eyangena neyaphuma kuma-akhawunti abanye abasolwa." URamaphosa uvulelwe icala lokwehluleka ukubika ngobugebengu, elokuqamba amanga efungile kanye nelenkohlakalo. Udaba lokuntshontshwa kwemali epulazini likaRamaphosa luqale phansi emva kwesinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosiseklo sangesonto eledlule. Inkantolo yachitha isinqumo sePhalamende sokunqaba ukwamukela umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe ukuba liphenye ngokuntshontshwa kwamadola aseMelika epulazini likaRamaphosa. Umbiko wethimba elaliholwa owayeyiJaji, uSandile Ngcobo, wathola ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona imigomo uRamaphosa ayiphula. Isinqumo senkantolo sesenze ukuthi iPhalamende liqhubeke nohlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Amaqembu ezepolitiki afuna uRamaphosa akhishwe esikhundleni. Amalungu esigungu esiphezulu kwi-ANC abenomhlangano oyisipesheli, izolo ebusuku lapho ebhunge khona ngalolu daba. Amalungu amaningi e-ANC ayameseka uRamaphosa kodwa kukhona afuna ukuthi ehle esikhundleni.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UKABZA De Small noDJ Maphorisa abaziwa ngeScorpion Kings ababonga uxhaso lwabalandeli babo kudayiswa ephela amathikithi omcimbi wabo ozoba ngoSepthemba IZINSIZWA esezizakhele igama endimeni yomculo ngisho emazweni omhlaba uKabza De Small noDJ Maphorisa abaziwa ngeThe Scorpion Kings, sezibonge abantu bakuleli ngokuzixhasa bathenga aphela amathikithi omcimbi wazo. Lokhu bakuveze izolo nala bethe uxhaso abaluthole kubantu yize kuqale kwaba nomsindo, luyamangalisa. Ekuqaleni kwale nyanga laba bamemezela izindaba zokuthi umcimbi iScorpion King Live uzoba ngoSepthemba 26, enkundleni yezemidlalo iFNB. Abantu abaningi bakhala ngokubiza kwamathikithi alo mcimbi, bathi lezi zinsizwa zinyuse kakhulu intengo yawo, akusafani naseminyakeni edlule. Lo mcimbi kulindeleke ukuthi ekuhambeni kwesikhathi ube ngomunye wemikhulu kuleli njengoba engu-70 000 amathikithi adayisiwe. UDJ Maphorisa uveze ukuthi bayabonga kakhulu ngothando abaluthole kubantu manje basezinhlelweni zokuthi bavule amathikithi akhethekile ngoMeyi 22. "Uthando abalandeli bethu abasikhombise lona lukwelinye izinga ngempela, ukubabona ngendlela ababe nesasasa ngayo simemezela umcimbi nokuvulwa kwamathikithi kusho lukhulu kithi futhi asikuthathi kancane lokho ngoba siba nomcimbi ngenxa yabo. Sibonga nokuthi njalo uma simemezela umcimbi basukuma bazithathe bese kuthi ngosuku lwawo bahlale nathi uze uphele, abakwenza kithi angeke size sikukhohlwe," kusho uMaphorisa. UKabza De Small uthe naye okukhulu ukuzithoba adlulise ukubonga njengoba okwenzekile kuwumlando kubo. "Siwadayise aphela amathikithi, okwamanje sisezinhlelweni zokufaka isicelo sokuthi sidayise amathikithi angu-10 000 ukuze sibe abantu abenza umcimbi omkhulu wesibili emhlabeni. Noma sibheke indlela yokuthi senze usuku lwesibili lwalo mcimbi, kodwa konke lokhu sisakubheka ukuthi ikuphi okungcono ukuze abalandeli bethu bajabule. Kunzima manje, silindele ukuthi nabafuna awezicukuthwane sebebonile ukuthi azoqala nini ukudayisa, siyabonga," kusho yena.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UKUNGACACI kokuthi idokodo lisezandleni zikabani, kuholele ekutheni lihlehliselwe uLwesithathu oluzayo, icala lokubulawa ngesihluku kowesilisa waseKoffee Farm, KwaNdengezi. UMnuz Kholwani Cele (34) kuthiwa washaywa waze wafa, isidumbu sakhe sabelethiswa itshe, sase siyophonswa emfuleni uMngeni. Wayegcine ukubonwa ephila ngo-Okthoba 23, nyakenye, ephuma emsebenzini, egoduka. NgoJanuwari nonyaka, kwaqale kwaboshwa umakhelwane, uMnuz Sibongiseni Johannes Mbhele, kwase kulandela kamumva abasolwa ngokuthi wayebambisene nabo enza icala, oMnuz Bongumusa Mkhonto noMnuz Sboniso Phungula, nabo abangabendawo. Izolo, uMbuso wenze isicelo sokuthi lihlehliswe icala ukuze kuqhutshekwe nophenyo. Phakathi kwalo, kuvele ukuthi idokodo lecala alikho phambi kwenkantolo futhi akuqondakali ngokugcwele ukuthi likuliphi ihhovisi. Kuvele ukuthi ngesikhathi lihlehla icala phambilini, nakhona lalingekho idokodo, kwavela ukuthi likudokotela ohlola ingqondo. Kwathiwa kulindeleke ukuthi abhale umbiko, awengeze edokodweni emva kokuhlola isimo somqondo kaMbhele. Phambilini, kwakukade kuphume umyalelo wokuthi ayohlolwa ingqondo kulandela ukuvela kolwazi lokuthi wake wathikamezeka eminyakeni eminingi edlule. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi lo mbiko noma umphumela wokuhlolwa kwakhe awukaze ubuye ukuzokwethulwa enkantolo ukuthi udokotela wamhlola maqede wathola umphumela othini. Imantshi, uNkk Wendolyn Robinson, ibe isilihlehlisela uLwesithathu oluzayo icala. Abasolwa bathamele icala ngohlelo lwe-video bengaphakathi ejele laseWestville, abezanga siqu sabo eNkantolo yeMantshi yasePinetown. Umndeni kamufi nakuba ukhombise ukumangala ngendida yokuthi idokodo liphi, uthe awukabi nazo izikhalazo ngecala, usazoqhubeka nokulokhu uza enkantolo ukuzolethamela. Umufi njengoba ayeduke ebuya emsebenzini ngo-Okthoba nyakenye, kuphele izinyanga ezintathu ethathwa njengomuntu odukile. Uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lwagcina luvundulule ukuthi umakhelwane wakhe, uMbhele, wuye onesandla ekudukeni kwakhe. Kuthiwa wagonyuluka, washo nokuthi bambulala bayomphonsa emfuleni. Emva kwengonyuluka yakhe, umndeni namaphoyisa wabe usuya endaweni yesigameko lapho wafike wathola khona isidumbu sikamufi, sase zingcwatshwa ngesizotha. Waveza ukushaqeka ngokuthi uMbhele wuye ongumsolwa wokuqala ecaleni, wathi babejwayelene kakhulu nomufi, ehlale efika ekhaya labo ukuzomvakashela. Nokho baveza ukuthi emva kokunyamalala kwakhe, kwaba khona isikhathi lapho kuthiwa noMbhele unyamalele, nokwaba yinto eyabamangaza ukuthi usedukiswa yini kodwa kwangaba bikho osola ukuthi usebalekela ukuthi "uyathinteka" ekufeni kukamufi. Izinsolo zokuthi umufi kukhona ayekuhlanganisa nomkaMbhele umndeni wazichitha, ngelithi wayengumuntu owayezihlonipha, engeke alenze ichilo lokuthi agange nenkosikazi yomuntu. Bathi banethemba lokuthi uma icala seliqhubeka, uMbhele uyosiveza isizathu sangempela esamenza wabulala umufi.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: USIPHESIHLE Ndlovu weKaizer Chiefs emaka uRelebohile Mofokeng we-Orlando Pirates ABAQEQESHI be-Orlando Pirates neKaizer Chiefs bajikijelane ngezimbokodo zamazwi alumelayo kulandela umdlalo wabakhaya weBetway Premiership obekugqame kuwona okubi kunengcwenga yebhola ngeSonto ntambama, e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. IPirates neChiefs babambane ngo 1-1 okungumphumela obukeke sengathi uphazamisa ezika-Ouaddou embangweni wesicoco seligi neMamelodi Sundowns. Ngaphambi kokuthi uqale lo mdlalo ohlehliswe ngemizuzu engu-35 ngenxa yokungafiki ngesikhathi kwabalandeli, kusuke isidumo phakathi kwabaqaphi bePirates nethimba elenza okufanayo kwiChiefs. Ngokusho kukaKhalil Ben Youssef kwabezindaba, iPirates ngeke iyiwine iligi uma izoqhubeka nokuziphatha ngendlela ayichaze njengengamukelekile. “Lo mdlalo ububukwa wumhlaba wonke kodwa okwenziwe yizitha kithina ngaphambi kokuqala komdlalo kuyaphoxa,” kusho uBen Youssef. “Kungani bengasivumeli ukuthi sikhululeke senze esithanda ukukwenza enkundleni esivumelekile ukuba kuyona? Uma abantu becabanga ukuthi la maqhinga abawasebenzisayo azobawinisa iligi kabakhohlwe,” kusho lo mqeqeshi sakubhuqa iPirates. U-Abdeslam Ouaddou wePirates akazange aliyeke ithuba lokugxeka iChiefs ngamaqhinga awachaze njengamabi okulimaza abadlali bakhe baphambili u-Oswin Appollis, Relebohile Mofokeng noTsepang Moremi othinteke esiwombeni sokuqala. “Kufanele ukuba kubaphoxile abalandeli beChiefs ukuthi iqembu labo lijabulela ukucazelana amaphuzu ngendlela engiyibone enkundleni,” kusho u-Ouaddou. “Kusobala ukuthi bebengazizele bona enkundleni kepha bebezophazamisa. Okunye okungishiye ngishaqekile yindlela abebedlalisa kabi ngayo abadlali bami. “Besizele ukuzodlala ibhola kodwa sizithole sesidlala i-karate,” kusho u-Ouaddou ngokuqinisa unyawo ngokweqile kweChiefs. Yize iChiefs iphazamise iPirates ngokuyibamba, kusengaba yilona futhi leli qembu laseNaturena, eliyiwezayo kwazise lisenomdlalo neSundowns ngaphambi kokusonga isizini.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: KUKHALWA ngothisha abavela kwamanye amazwe, asebeqashelwe ukufundisa izilimi zakuleli, ekubeni kunothisha ababhuquza emakhaya abangasebenzi. Lesi sikhalo sivezwe amalungu ePhalamende, akhale ngokuthi kwezinye izifundazwe kuqashwe othisha abavela kwamanye amazwe, abafundisa izifundo ezithathwa njengezingadingi ubuchule obuthile. UMqondisi jikelele eMnyangweni weMfundo eyisiSekelo uMnuz Mathanzima Mweli, uthe utholile ukuthi kwezinye izifundazwe othisha abavela kwamanye amazwe bafundisa izilimi zomdabu. "Sike saba nenkinga yokuthi sidinga othisha abazofundisa izifundo ezifana neMaths neSayensi. Othisha bakwamanye amazwe kumele bathathwe uma bezofundisa lezi zifundo hhayi ukuthi bafundise izilimi zakuleli. Kwezinye izifundazwe engizihambele, ngithole ukuthi othisha bakwamanye amazwe abafundisi izifundo ezifana neMaths neSayensi, kodwa sebefundisa izifundo ezingadingi ubuchule namava athile ezifana nezilimi. Ngiyavumelana nabathi kumele kulezi zikhala kufakwe othisha bakuleli abangasebenzi," kusho uMweli, ekhuluma emhlanganweni wekomiti muva nje. UMnuz Siphetho Mkhize weqembu iMKP, ukhale ngokuthi baningi othisha abavela kwamanye amazwe abangafundisi izifundo ezifana neMaths neSayensi. "Kumele kuqashwe inqwaba yothisha bakuleli abahleli emakhaya ngoba bengenawo umsebenzi. Akukwazi ukuthi ezifundweni ezifana nezingadingi ubuchule obutheni, kufundise abantu abavela kwamanye amazwe ekubeni bekhona abantu kuleli abagogodile," usho kanje. UMweli uvumelene noMkhize wathi kumele le nkinga ibhekwe kabanzi. Othisha abangasebenzi bahlale bemashela umnyango wezemfundo ikakhulu KwaZulu-Natal, befuna ukuqashwa.
