Umnyango wesifundazwe uhlale uveza izingqinamba zesabelomali esingenele esenza ungakwazi ukuqasha othisha. Ubuye waveza ukuthi kumele kuqiniswe kakhulu ekubhekeni uhlelo lokukhokhelwa kwabasebenzi kuhulumeni, iPersal njengoba ngesikhathi kwenziwa ucwaningo ngabasebenzi bahulumeni, kuvele ukuthi abanye ulwazi lwabo alukho kwiPersal. Umkhandlu okubhungwa kuwona izindaba zothisha i-Education Labour Relations Council, wenze ucwaningo obelufuna ukuhlonza izipoki zabasebenzi kwezemfundo, kanti bangu-438 000 ababhekiwe ukuthi ngempela badla anhlamvana. Ucwaningo lwenziwe ezikoleni ezingu-21 174, kubafundi abangu-11.7 million. Ucwaningo luveze ukuthi kunemininingwane yabasebenzi ababalelwa ku-22 409 kwiPersal, eshayisanayo. Abanye kuthiwa bavela ukuthi baqashwe ezifundazweni ezimbili. Lezi ngezinye zezinto okumele ziphenyisiswe. UMnyango weMfundo eWestern Cape, awuzange ube yingxenye yokwenziwa kocwaningo, okungenye yezinto ekhalise amalungu ePhalamende.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMHOLI waseBuhleni kwaShembe uNyazilwezulu ngesikhathi ehlangene nabaholi beKhomishini yezoKhetho kuleli sonto IZIKHULU zeKhomishini yezoKhetho kuleli zinabefundisi bakwaShembe ngesikhathi zihlangene noNyazilwezulu ZISONGE uhambo lwaKwaZulu-Natal ngokuhlangana neKhabhinethi yesifundazwe izikhulu zeKhomishini yezoKhetho kuleli. Lezi zikhulu beziqhubeka nokuhlangana nezinhlaka ezehlukene kuleli, okubalwa amaqembu ezepolitiki, abamahlelo ahlukene, amakhosi kanjalo nezinye izinhlaka. NgoLwesibili izikhulu ebeziholwa nguSihlalo weKhomishini, uMnuz Mosotho Moepya, zihlangane nomholi webandla lakwaShembe, ohlangothini lwaseBuhleni, uNyazilwezulu, KwaMhlabuyalingana. Kulo mhlangano lizikhulu beziyondlala izinhlelo zokhetho oluzayo, lwangoNovemba 4, 2026. Isitatimende seKhomishini emuva komhlangano, sithe obekuseqhulwini wukuqinisa eyokusebenzisana njengoba kuzoba nokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. "Sifuna umphakathi ubambe iqhaza ezinhlelweni zokuvota ikakhulu eKZN. Sizimisele ukuxazulula zonke izikhalo ezithinta ukhetho nokuvota. Siyazibophezela ekubambeni ukhetho olunokuthula nolukhululekile," kusho iKhomishini ethe lube yimpumelelo uhambo lwayo. Izkhulu zeKhomishini zihamba ziphinde zibuyele kulesi sifundazwe nje, yingoba kunombiko owaveza ukuthi abantu bakulesi sifundazwe, abasayingeni eyokubamba iqhaza okhethweni. Lolu cwaningo lwajutshwa yiKhomishini ukuzwa ukuphawula komphakathi ngezithinta ukuvota kuleli. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, ngenyanga ezayo kuzovulwa ithuba lokuthi abantu babhalisele ukuvota. Lokhu kuzokwenzeka ngempelasonto yangoJuni 20 no-21. Abantu bayanxuswa ukuthi babhalisele ukuvota ngoba kulolu khetho bazokwazi ukuvota kuphela lapho bebhalise khona. Kwenzeka lokhu nje iqembu iMKP lifuna luhlehliswe ukhetho ngoba lisakhala ngokuthi labanjwa inkunzi emiphumeleni yokhetho lukazwelonke lwango-2024. Izikhulu zekhomishini zihlanganile muva nje nomholi waleli qembu uMnuz Jacob Zuma mayelana nezikhalo anazo kodwa yathi iyaqhubeka necala elizongena ngenyanga ezayo elimayelana nesikhalo ngale miphumela.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMCULI we-jazz, uNduduzo Makhathini, nendodana yakhe, uThingo Makhathini, asebenze nayo kwi-albhamu yakhe ezophuma ngoJuni Image: Instagram/Nduduzo Makhathini UMCULI we-jazz, uNduduzo Makhathini, ujatshuliswa ukuphrojusa i-albhamu yakhe entsha  ngokuhlanganyela nendodana yakhe, uThingo, akubona kuzoheha nentsha. UNduduzo ophinde abe wuthisha womculo njengoba eneziqu zobudokotela kuwo, ulungiselela ukukhipha i-albhamu, i-The Myth We Choose ngoJuni. Kumanje usekhiphe ingoma eyendlalelayo ethi Kuzodlula. Uthe i-albhamu uyiphrojuse ngokuhlanganyela noThingo Makhathini (18). “Ukusebenzisana noThingo akuyona into eqalayo. Kwi-albhamu yokuqala eyayithi Sketches of Tomorrow (eyaphuma ngo-2014), babekhona abantwana uNailah, uThingo noMoyo becula. Balokhu beqhamuka bevela emsebenzini ngezindlela ezahlukile kodwa useyaqala ukuhlala esihlalweni sokuthi kube wuyena umdidiyeli noma uphrojusa kule albhamu,” kusho uNduduzo ekhuluma naleli phephandaba ese-United States of America (USA), lapho enomjikelezo khona. Uthe izingane zakhe ziyawuthanda umculo ngoba beziwufunda ezikoleni zamabanga aphansi kodwa uThingo uyena obonakala ngathi ufuna ukuwuqhuba. “Ulethe izithako ezintsha ezenza ukuthi lo mculo nabantu abancane ngokweminyaka bazowuthanda kakhulu.” Uthe baningi asebenze nabo okubalwa kubo uBlack Coffee, umkakhe u-Omagugu, Dalisu Ndlazi, Lukmil Perez, Ayana Sikade, Shabaka Hutchings, Robin Fassie, Keenan Ahrends, Thando Zide noMuneyi. Uthe i-albhamu likhuluma ngomlando nendlela okuthiwa abantu bavela ngayo emhlabeni. “NgesiZulu kuthiwa sadabuka ohlangeni, kube khona abantu abanjengoMvelikuqala kube khona oNomkhubulwane. Siyabheka ukuthi mhlawumbe lezo zindaba zendabuko zixhumana nekusasa? Yiziphi kulezi zindatshana esizikhumbulayo nokuthi ziwukhanda kanjani umlando wethu nendlela yokuziphatha? Ngizama ukuxhumanisa lokho njengoba mhlawumbe eminyakeni eyikhulu ezayo, sikhulume ngoNomkhubulwane ukuthi yiziphi izindaba ezintsha eziyokwakha abantu nemiphakathi nendlela yokuziphatha.” Uphethe ngokudlulisa amazwi enduduzo ngokudlula emhlabeni kuka-Albert Mazibuko weLadysmith Black Mambazo, asebenze naye. Muva nje, bakhiphe i-albhamu ngokuhlanganyela neMambazo, kubalwa noMbuso Khoza ethi One Voice – One World. “Abantu abanjengobaba uMazibuko babe negalelo nanokuthi babe nendlela yokuthi yini abafuna ukuyishiya siyikhumbula ngabo lokho okuyifudumezayo inhliziyo ngesikhathi sokukhala. Basishiye nolwazi oluningi, basishiye namathuba amaningi futhi sizohlala sibakhumbula ngamagalelo abo. Kuye kuthiwa umuntu onjengobaba uMazibuko akahambi usekhona, uphila kumculo nezimfundiso nakho konke akwenzile emhlabeni.”

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UNOZINTI weDurban City, u-Ayanda Mtshali, odalule ukuthi usethi khumu ebholeni elikhokhelayo ekupheleni kwale sizini I-DURBAN City ezodlala kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo, inenselelo yokuphuma inqina iyozingela unozinti njengoba onozinti bayo ababili, uDarren Keet no-Ayanda “Pepe” Mtshali, bewaphanyeka emgibeni amagilavu ekupheleni kwesizini. Kungakapholi maseko uKeet (36) ememezele ukuthi useyayeka ukudlala ibhola, uMtshali naye usedalule ukuthi yisizini yakhe yokugcina lena. UMtshali (38) odabuka eSection 3, eMadadeni, eNewcastle, uveze ukuthi isinqumo wasithatha ngemuva kokuthi iCity iwine isicoco seligi seMotsepe Foundation Championship ngesizini edlule. Uthe ubehlele ukuthi uzodlala isizini eyodwa kwiBetway Premiership. “Ngibone sekuyisikhathi sokuthi nginike abanye ithuba, ikakhulukazi njengoba bengingasalitholi ithuba lokudlala njalo. Kule minyaka yobudala engikuyona njengamanje ngidinga ukudlala njalo. "Ngemuva kokuwina kwethu iligi yeMotsepe Foundation Championship ngesizini edlule, bekuvele kusezinhlelweni zami ukuthi ngidlale isizini eyodwa kwiBetway Premiership, bese ngithatha umhlalaphansi ebholeni. "Okungijabulisayo ukuthi ngiyeke ibhola nendondo yegolide ngokuwina indebe yeNedbank Cup neqembu lami iDurban City,” kusho uMtshali, oqale ukudlala ibhola elikhokhelayo ngesizini ka-2010/11 kwiBlack Leopards. Udlale nakwiFree State Stars, Bloemfontein Celtic, Chippa United, ngaphambi kokujoyina iCity ngesizini ka-2023/24 isabizwa ngeMaritzburg United. Uthe yize esengene endimeni yomculo kodwa ngeke aphume ebholeni njengoba esezinhlelweni zokuzithuthukisa ngolwazi lokuqeqesha. Uneziqu ze-Caf D Licence. “Bengivele nginothando lomculo kusukela ebuncaneni bami. Ngo-2018, ngavula i-studio i-Unified Entertainment eGoli, nomfowethu omncane, u-Anele. "Sike sama iminyaka embalwa, kwathi ngoJanuwari kulo nyaka, saphinda sasivula i-studio, sasayinisa abaculi abayisithupha ukuqopha kuso. "Sengiqalile ukuqeqesha onozinti eqenjini lethu leDiski Challenge. Kodwa ngizobona ngokuhamba kwesikhathi ukuthi ngilandela muphi umgudu ekufezekiseni iphupho lami lokuba ngumqeqeshi ngokugcwele,” kusho uMtshali. Njengamanje iCitizens inonozinti ababili, okunguFredrick Asare osayiniswe yileli qembu kule sizini esuka kwi-Asante Kotoko yaseGhana, no-Adren Dreyer naye osayiniswe kule sizini esuka kwiCape Town Spurs.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMPHATHI woKhozi FM uLwazi Mthabela UKHOZI FM alufani nezinye iziteshi zomsakazo ezithe chithi saka umhlaba wonke. Ngale kokuthokozisa abalaleli balo, Ukhozi luyisikhungo esiyifagugu lesizwe esidumile, uZulu. Lesi siteshi sikhipha ulwazi, sibuye sifundise kodwa sibe siyiwumthombo wokuvikela nokukhulisa ulimi lwesiZulu. Ngamanye amagama, Ukhozi luklama indima enkulu ekuthuthukiseni ulimi nangosiko lwesiZulu njengoba luyisiteshi esibizwa nge-public broadcasting service (PBS) vele. Iziteshi zalolu hlobo zakhelwe ukwazisa, ukufundisa nokujabulisa ngolimi oluthize njengoba sibona Umhlobo Wenene, ogxile olimini isiXhosa. Yingakho-ke izingququko esiteshini esinje zithinta abaningi ngoba abalaleli baso banezwi, futhi kufanele, ekulawulweni komsakazo. Ukhozi lusanda kushintsha izinhlelo, lwafaka nabasakazi abasha abasebancane. Yinto ejabulisayo lena futhi ekhombisa ukuthi balungiselela ingomuso. Kuyijoka elinzima kubaphathi balesi siteshi ngoba bathi beqinisekisa ukuthi Ukhozi FM luyaqhubeka nokuba yigugu kubalaleli, kodwa futhi kudingeke bakwazi ukuheha abakhangisi ukuze isiteshi sikwazi ukwenza inzuzo okuyiyo ephila ngayo. Nansi-ke inselelo ezivezayo kubaphathi: yokuthi noma izinto zishintsha, imali ingabi phambili bese bekhohlwa okumelwe yisiteshi. Ulimi kumele kuqikelelwe ukuthi aludungeki ngoba lokho kuthinta abalaleli entweni abanemizwa ejulile ngayo. Okukhulunywa oKhozini kufinyelela kwabaningi, ngakho ukuchezuka kungagcina kuyindlela ejwayelekile yokukhuluma ekubeni ithunaza futhi ulimi. Abasakazi babhekene nenselelo yokuthi bafike nokwehlukile nokuhehela ontanga babo kulesi siteshi, kodwa bebe bevikela leli gugu abalaleli balo msakazo abangezwa mshini ngalo. Kukule ndawana-ke lapha abasakazi abasha bezovivinyeka khona ngoba akukhona ukugijima nekhono kuphela, kodwa ukunyathela emgqeni owamukelekile kubanikazi bendaba - abalaleli. Sibonile ezinsukwini ezinkundleni zokuxhumana abantu bentinyela umethuli omusha wezemigwaqo uNokwanda Tema. Yize kungekho monakalo otheni kwayekusho noma ekwenza kodwa okwahlala obala wukuthi umlaleli woKhozi uyiphoyisa "eligade umzila" walo. Okuhle ukuthi bakhona ongoti bolimi abasebenzisana nalo Ukhozi abangeseka umsakazo ngamagama ashaya ngqo nasebenza kulesi simanjemanje ukuze abasakazi bengakhoseli kaningi esiNgisini nxa bexinwa ukuncishelwa eguleni lolimi.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UPAPA Penny usule isigubhukane ekubeni yilungu leMK Party nasekubeni yilungu laleli qembu ePhalamende UMAKADEBONA emculweni nezikaqedisizingu obesegxile kwezepolitiki, uGezane Eric Kobane, odume ngelikaPapa Penny - ukhale ngobunyoka ebuholini beqembu lezepolitiki uMkhonto Wesizwe Party (MK) ngenkathi esula isigubhukane kulona ngoLwesihlanu. Encwadini yakhe yokwesula ayibhekise kumholi weqembu uMnuz Jacob Zuma, uPapa Penny uthe ukwesula ekubeni yilungu le-MKP nasekubeni yilungu layo ePhalamende kube yisinqumo esingelula neze nesimphule inhliziyo. Uthe wajoyina i-MK Party ngokwakhe ngoba efuna ukukhulula abantu bakuleli zwe, kodwa lokho kwaphazamiseka ngenxa yengxenye ethile yobuholi baleli qembu eLimpopo - akhale ngokuthi idale ukuthi abe nyamanambana emalungwini eqembu. Ukhale nangokuthi ubebhekene nezimpi ebeziqondiswe kuyena, ehlukunyezwa futhi kwenziwa isiqiniseko sokuthi uhlale ezizwa ecindezelekile. Wengeze nangokuthi bekuze kusetshenziswane nabezindaba ukucekela phansi isithunzi sakhe negama lakhe akusebenzele kanzima. UPAPA Penny usule isigubhukane ekubeni yilungu leMK Party nasekubeni yilungu laleli qembu ePhalamende Image: VUYILE MADWANTSI Njengoba ngiwumuntu okhathalele inhlalakahle yabantu neyomphakathi, bengingazibekezelela lezi zimo ukube beziyimbangela yabanye abantu abaseceleni. Manje inkinga yami wukuthi ziqhamuka ngaphakathi eqenjini ebengikulona okwenza ukuthi kube nzima ukuzishaya indiva sengathi angiboni ngibe ngibona kahle,” kusho uPapa Penny. Nokho uthe nakuba kunjalo, uyazibongela kuZuma ngokumnika ithuba lokuthi amele iqembu ePhalamende futhi amele nabantu baseNingizimu Afrika esebenzisa amandla eMK Party. Leli qembu eliholwa wuZuma owayengumengameli wezwe, lilokhu liqhubeke njalo nokubhekana nezinkinga ezilizamazamisayo selokhu langenela ukhetho lukazwelonke eminyakeni emibili edlule, okufakazelwa wukuhlale kushintsha izinto ngaphakathi kulona. Sekuvamile ukuthi lihlale lipheka lithulula ezikhundleni ezihlukene. Ukwesula kukaPapa Penny kulindeleke ukuthi kushaye kuzwele kuleli qembu eLimpopo, ikakhulu kuMasipala wesifunda iMopani naseGiyani, okuyilapho enabalandeli kakhulu khona. UPapa Penny uke waba nohlelo kwiMzansi Magic obeluthandwa kakhulu oluthi Papa Penny Ahe - nolwakhonjiswa amasizini amane. Wafungiswa ukuba yilungu lePhalamende le-MK Party emva kokhetho lukazwelonke ngo-2024.
